Title: Muscleblind-like proteins dimerize by forming disulfide bonds to regulate alternative splicing and pathogenic RNA foci formation.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过半胱氨酸形成二聚体，调控可变剪接并维持RNA foci完整性，影响强直性肌营养不良1型的病理机制。

Title: Correction to "Metformin Reduces the Senescence of Renal Tubular Epithelial Cells in Diabetic Nephropathy via the MBNL1/miR-130a-3p/STAT3 Pathway".
Herpesvirus-encoded lncRNA targets host splicing by interacting with splicing factors.
Key_Finding: MBNL1作为剪接因子与KSHV的ALT lncRNA相互作用，干扰宿主基因表达，促进病毒复制和免疫逃逸。

Title: Dysregulated NK-cell gene expression defines the enduring symptoms of long COVID-19.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在长新冠患者中表达下调，与NK细胞功能缺陷和神经感觉通路抑制相关。

Title: Commitment to Myogenic Differentiation Significantly Aggravates the RNA Phenotype in Myotonic Dystrophy Type 1.
Cell_Lines: DM1 myoblast cell lines, DM∆ myoblast cell lines
Key_Finding: MBNL1在肌生成过程中通过调控分化依赖性可变剪接发挥关键作用，其功能失调导致DM1患者肌生成障碍。

Title: Targeting Expanded CUG and CTG Repeats as a Therapeutic Approach for Myotonic Dystrophy Type 1 (DM1).
Key_Finding: MBNL1在强直性肌营养不良1型中因被毒性RNA隔离而功能丧失，导致剪接调控异常，是治疗策略的关键靶点。

Title: Mechanisms Underlying Aberrant Splicing of Transcripts From the Intron-Less Coding Sequence of SPCA1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1促进无内含子mRNA的异常剪接，揭示了表达系统中隐蔽剪接位点与调控序列空间邻近诱导异常剪接的机制。

Title: Cancer-associated fibroblast-derived exosomal LINC00930 represses cell malignancy and glycolysis by recruiting MBNL1 and elevating PRKAA2 stability in colorectal cancer.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过提高PRKAA2的稳定性，介导CAF来源的外泌体LINC00930对结直肠癌进展的抑制作用。

Title: Enhanced muscle uptake of chemically optimized miR-23b antisense oligonucleotides as lead compounds for myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: 通过抑制miR-23b恢复MBNL1功能，纠正错误剪接，改善肌肉力量和肌强直，为强直性肌营养不良1型提供潜在治疗策略。

Title: A rare cytogenetically cryptic MECOM rearrangement in a patient with myelodysplastic neoplasm and SF3B1 mutation identified by RNA sequencing: a case report.
Disease_Type: Myelodysplastic Neoplasm (MDS) and Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML)
Key_Finding: MBNL1与MECOM发生罕见重排，导致EVI1过表达，可能与SF3B1突变协同驱动白血病发生。

Title: An RBPMS-driven splicing regulatory axis including MBNL1, RBFOX2, and QK promotes smooth muscle cell contractile identity.
Key_Finding: MBNL1与RBPMS、RBFOX2和QK共同调控血管平滑肌细胞的可变剪接，促进收缩表型，影响细胞形态和功能，但RBPMS是主导调控因子。

Title: MBNL loss of function in smooth muscle as a model for myotonic dystrophy associated gastrointestinal dysmotility.
Key_Finding: MBNL1缺失通过调控与平滑肌收缩相关的转录本可变剪接，导致胃肠道平滑肌过度活跃，这可能是DM1患者胃肠道功能障碍的机制。

Title: Post-transcriptional control of HIF-1α by MBNL1 restrains hypoxia-driven stemness in GBM.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过结合HIF-1α 3'UTR促进其mRNA快速降解，从而限制HIF-1活性和缺氧诱导的胶质母细胞瘤干细胞特性，为GBM治疗提供新靶点。

Title: A Live-Cell NanoBRET Assay to Monitor RNA-Protein Interactions and Their Inhibition by Small Molecules.
Key_Finding: 开发了一种活细胞NanoBRET检测方法，用于研究r-(CUG)exp与MBNL1的相互作用，并筛选出能破坏该复合物的小分子化合物，其中五种在患者来源的肌管中挽救了DM1的细胞特征。

Title: Cardioprotective role of RBFox1 in myocardial infarction-induced heart failure.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过可变剪接产生C末端缺失的异构体，在心肌梗死中调控细胞死亡，其选择性抑制可保护心脏免受损伤。

Title: Characterization of DMPK and MBNL1 expression in cell models of myotonic dystrophy: a platform for drug screening.
Key_Finding: 开发了一个基于ddPCR和细胞内Western的体外筛选平台，用于量化DM1相关mRNA和蛋白质，并评估了DMPK gapmer ASO和siRNA对MBNL1蛋白水平的影响，其中gapmer能增加MBNL1蛋白水平。

Title: Alternative Splicing of SORBS1 Affects Neuromuscular Junction Integrity in Myotonic Dystrophy Type 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1调控SORBS1的可变剪接，影响神经肌肉接头形成和维持，在肌强直性营养不良1型中导致神经肌肉系统功能障碍。

Title: Widespread prevalence of CD19 exon 5-6 skipping in primary pediatric B-Cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia patients.
Key_Finding: MBNL1调控CD19基因外显子5-6的可变剪接，其失调可能导致患者对CD19靶向免疫疗法产生耐药性。

Title: MBNL1 Modulates Nek7 to Facilitate Pathological Cardiac Hypertrophy via NLRP3.
Key_Finding: MBNL1作为上游调控因子，通过结合Nek7 mRNA调控其转录和表达水平，从而影响心脏肥大的病理过程。

Title: Multi-omics identification of RNASE6 as an immune regulatory RNA-binding protein associated with melanoma metastasis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被识别为与黑色素瘤转移相关的免疫相关RNA结合蛋白之一，但研究核心发现RNASE6通过促进M1巨噬细胞极化来影响黑色素瘤转移和免疫治疗结果。

Title: Elimination of myotonia improves myopathy in a muscleblind knockout model of myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1缺失导致氯离子通道1（ClC-1）的可变剪接异常，特别是外显子7a的异常包含，是引起肌强直和肌病的关键机制，靶向纠正此剪接事件可恢复功能并改善肌肉病理。

Title: Co-Opting MBNL-Dependent Alternative Splicing Cassette Exons to Control Gene Therapy in Myotonic Dystrophy.
Key_Finding: 开发了一种基于MBNL1调控的可变剪接响应元件DMX<sup>on</sup>，能够控制AAV病毒载体中治疗性MBNL1蛋白的表达，改善DM1小鼠模型的骨骼肌强直并预防心脏毒性，提高病毒疗法的治疗窗口。

Title: Promoter-targeted small RNA duplexes increase MBNL1 transcription and mitigate myotonic dystrophy-associated spliceopathy.
Key_Finding: 通过saRNA靶向激活MBNL1基因转录，可纠正肌强直性营养不良相关的可变剪接缺陷，为疾病治疗提供新策略。

Title: Differential pathology and susceptibility to MBNL loss across muscles in myotonic dystrophy mouse models.
Key_Finding: MBNL1缺失通过剪接非依赖机制导致肌肉纤维萎缩，其模式更接近DM1而非DM2，提示MBNL1缺失在DM1肌肉受累模式中起主导作用。

Title: Transcriptome alterations underlying metabolic dysfunction and liver disease in myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在强直性肌营养不良1型中通过调控肝脏转录组变化，特别是脂质和葡萄糖代谢相关基因的可变剪接，影响疾病相关的代谢和肝脏异常。

Title: Genomic Analysis of Adaptability and Genetic Structure of Jabal Akhdar Goats: Evidence of Positive Selection in an Indigenous Omani Breed.
Key_Finding: MBNL1基因在Jabal Akhdar山羊中被鉴定为与肌肉发育和功能相关的正选择区域基因，可能有助于其环境适应性。

Title: Ring-finger protein RNF126 promotes prostate cancer progression via regulation of MBNL1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1是RNF126介导的前列腺癌发生和化疗耐药的关键下游事件，驱动PI3K/AKT、MEK/ERK和EMT通路。

Title: Mbnl1 Protects Against Cerebral Ischemia-Reperfusion Injury by Modulating Microglia/Macrophage Polarization via NF-κB Pathway.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过抑制NF-κB信号通路调节小胶质细胞介导的神经炎症，对缺血性卒中发挥保护作用并促进认知恢复。

Title: Repeat length as a key determinant for disease severity and antisense oligonucleotide activity in myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1的核内丰度与CTG重复序列长度相关，影响异常剪接的纠正效果，突显了在DM1临床试验中考虑基因型异质性的重要性。

Title: Hexahydrocurcumin suppresses hepatocellular carcinoma by regulating TRIM23/MBNL1 pathway.
Key_Finding: MBNL1作为TRIM23的底物，在HHC治疗肝癌中起关键作用，通过TRIM23/MBNL1轴发挥抑癌功能。

Title: Comparative Analysis of MBNL1 Antibodies: Characterization of Recognition Sites and Detection of RNA Foci Colocalization.
Cell_Lines: HEK293, DM1 model cells, patient-derived fibroblasts
Key_Finding: 本研究比较了六种MBNL1抗体的特异性，阐明了它们在Western blot、RNA foci共定位和免疫沉淀中的适用性，为MBNL1相关疾病研究提供了重要工具资源。

Title: Identification of Splicing Regulatory Activity of ATXN1 and Its Associated Domains.
Key_Finding: ATXN1通过其中心区域和AXH结构域调控可变剪接，为SCA1的发病机制提供了新见解。

Title: Shared Genetic Characteristics of Coronary Artery Disease and Peripheral artery Disease: Insights From Integrated Bioinformatics Analysis of RNA-Sequencing Data.
Disease_Type: Coronary artery disease (CAD) and peripheral artery disease (PAD)
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为冠状动脉疾病和周围动脉疾病患者共享的10个枢纽基因之一，可能通过RNA剪接等机制参与疾病网络调控。

Title: Exosome-derived lnc-FAM72D-3 promotes lenvatinib resistance by remodeling hepatocellular carcinoma cytoskeleton via MBNL1/FAK axis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过HECTD3介导的泛素化降解，减少与FAK的相互作用，导致FAK去核化和磷酸化激活，从而促进肝细胞癌的增殖、侵袭和干性，加剧乐伐替尼耐药。

Title: RNA‑binding protein MBNL1 regulates tumor growth, chemosensitivity and antitumor immunity in lung adenocarcinoma by controlling the expression of tumor suppressor RNF125.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过增加RNF125转录本的稳定性，在肺腺癌中发挥抗肿瘤作用。

Title: Comprehensive analysis of splicing variants in corneal endothelial cells of patients with Fuchs endothelial corneal dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为FECD患者中TCF4基因三核苷酸重复扩增导致的可变剪接改变的可能调控因子，提示异常剪接在FECD发病机制中起关键作用。

Title: Autism-related traits in myotonic dystrophy type 1 model mice are due to MBNL sequestration and RNA mis-splicing of autism-risk genes.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被突变DMPK RNA隔离导致自闭症风险基因在脑发育过程中发生错误剪接，这解释了肌强直性营养不良与自闭症之间的分子联系。

Title: Pentatricopeptide repeat protein targeting CUG repeat RNA ameliorates RNA toxicity in a myotonic dystrophy type 1 mouse model.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被CUG重复序列RNA劫持，导致正常剪接程序破坏，是强直性肌营养不良1型的关键致病机制。

Title: DM1 repeat-expanded RNAs confer RNA toxicity as individual nuclear-retained RNAs.
Key_Finding: 研究发现，核内滞留的CUG重复RNA通过隔离MBNL1蛋白（而非依赖高阶RNA组装）来促进疾病进展。

Title: Systematic exploration of prognostic alternative splicing events related to tumor immune microenvironment of Clear Cell Renal Cell Carcinoma.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控QKI的可变剪接，抑制肾透明细胞癌的增殖和转移，促进细胞凋亡，并阻滞细胞于G2/M期。

Title: Multiple regulatory events contribute to a widespread circular RNA downregulation in precancer and early stage of colorectal cancer development.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在结直肠癌早期发生中参与circRNA生物合成，其表达减少与circRNA水平下降相关，可能影响细胞增殖和c-Myc信号通路。

Title: MBNL overexpression rescues cardiac phenotypes in a myotonic dystrophy type 1 heart mouse model.
Key_Finding: MBNL1的过表达能部分拯救DM1心脏表型，包括传导延迟、收缩功能障碍、肥大以及错误调控的可变剪接和基因表达，表明MBNL功能丧失是DM1心脏表现的主要因素。

Title: The m6A modification regulates the composition of myofiber types in chicken skeletal muscle.
Key_Finding: 研究发现MBNL1作为肌纤维类型相关基因，其m6A甲基化水平和mRNA表达在氧化型和糖酵解型骨骼肌中存在差异，提示其在肌纤维类型特性形成中的潜在作用。

Title: Differences in splicing factors may predict type 2 diabetes remission in the CORDIOPREV study.
Key_Finding: MBNL1作为剪接因子之一，其基线表达水平与冠心病患者中2型糖尿病缓解的预测相关，有助于改善临床预测模型。

Title: Aerobic Training Alleviates Muscle Atrophy by Promoting the Proliferation of Skeletal Muscle Satellite Cells in Myotonic Dystrophy Type 1 by Inhibiting Glycolysis via the Upregulation of MBNL1.
Key_Finding: 有氧训练通过上调MBNL1抑制骨骼肌卫星细胞的糖酵解，从而促进其增殖并缓解肌肉萎缩。

Title: Interrogation of RNA-bound proteome with XRNAX illuminates molecular alterations in the mouse brain affected with dysmyelination.
Key_Finding: MBNL1调控的可变剪接外显子模式在髓鞘缺陷和野生型大脑之间存在差异，这可能与Mbnl1剪接扰动和该位点产生的环状RNA有关。

Title: Antisense oligonucleotides as a targeted therapeutic approach in model of acute myeloid leukemia.
Key_Finding: 该研究通过靶向MBNL1基因外显子7的反义寡核苷酸技术，在急性髓系白血病模型中优化了方法，观察到外显子7基因变体在转染后48小时被最高程度阻断。

Title: Probing the Mesenchymal Stem Cell Aging through In silico Assessment of Extracellular Vesicle-mediated miRNAs.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在间充质干细胞衰老过程中，作为RNA结合蛋白参与将特定miRNAs转运至细胞外囊泡，可能调控衰老相关信号通路。

Title: Mbnl1-mediated alternative splicing of circMlxipl regulates Rbbp6-involved ChREBP turnover to inhibit lipotoxicity-induced β-cell damage.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控circMlxipl的可变剪接，调节Rbbp6介导的ChREBP降解，从而抑制脂毒性诱导的β细胞损伤，缓解糖尿病症状。

Title: MBNL deficiency in motor neurons disrupts neuromuscular junction maintenance and gait coordination.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在运动神经元中通过调控与突触传递和神经肌肉接头稳态相关的基因的可变剪接，对维持神经肌肉接头结构和运动功能至关重要。

Title: Altered drug metabolism and increased susceptibility to fatty liver disease in a mouse model of myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被CUG重复RNA隔离导致乙酰辅酶A羧化酶1表达增加和可变剪接异常，驱动DM1肝脏中脂质过度积累，增加代谢功能障碍相关脂肪肝病和药物清除障碍风险。

Title: AntimiR treatment corrects myotonic dystrophy primary cell defects across several CTG repeat expansions with a dual mechanism of action.
Key_Finding: 靶向miR-23b和miR-218的antimiRs通过提升MBNL1表达，改善DM1的RNA毒性、纠正可变剪接异常并逆转68%的失调基因，为治疗不同CTG重复长度的DM1提供潜在策略。

Title: Diagnostic and prognostic significance of serum lncRNA MBNL1-AS1 expression in patients with atherosclerosis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1在动脉粥样硬化患者血清中高表达，可作为临床诊断的潜在标志物，并与不良预后相关。

Title: LncRNA MBNL1-AS1 functions as an alternative atherosclerosis biomarker in elderly hypertensive patients and regulates vascular smooth muscle cell function.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过调控miR-424-5p促进高血压诱导的动脉粥样硬化进展，影响血管平滑肌细胞的增殖和迁移。

Title: CUG repeat RNA-dependent proteasomal degradation of MBNL1 in a cellular model of myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: CUG重复RNA通过不依赖多聚泛素化的蛋白酶体降解途径降低MBNL1蛋白水平，部分导致其功能下降。

Title: Ameliorated cellular hallmarks of myotonic dystrophy in hybrid myotubes from patient and unaffected donor cells.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1中被核RNA foci隔离，但未受影响的周细胞融合可减少RNA foci并增加游离MBNL1，改善疾病标志物。

Title: MBNL splicing factors regulate the microtranscriptome of skeletal muscles.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控miRNA初级转录本的可变剪接来影响miRNA表达，其功能缺失导致miRNA表达谱从成年型向新生儿型转变，这可能是强直性肌营养不良1型中miRNA失调的部分原因。

Title: Expression levels of core spliceosomal proteins modulate the MBNL-mediated spliceopathy in DM1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1与剪接体蛋白的化学计量比在调节DM1剪接病中起关键作用，为治疗提供了新靶点。

Title: CircCNNs, a convolutional neural network framework to better understand the biogenesis of exonic circRNAs.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被识别为与环状RNA反向剪接过程相关的基因之一，通过机器学习模型揭示了其在环状RNA形成中的潜在作用。

Title: Changes in Physiopathological Markers in Myotonic Dystrophy Type 1 Skeletal Muscle: A 3-Year Follow-up Study.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1中被CTG重复序列的mRNA隔离，导致其功能丧失，与肌肉力量损失和自噬标记物变化相关，但摘要未明确其具体调控机制。

Title: Identification of miRNA expression profile in middle ear cholesteatoma using small RNA-sequencing.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为中耳胆脂瘤中差异表达miRNA的潜在关键靶基因，可能参与其发病机制。

Title: Immortalized human myotonic dystrophy type 1 muscle cell lines to address patient heterogeneity.
Key_Finding: 该研究建立了三种DM1患者来源的永生化肌肉细胞系，这些模型能重现DM1的临床异质性，包括MBNL1被隔离和剪接改变等特征，适用于研究DM1病理生理异质性和测试未来治疗方案。

Title: Seeing is Believing: Muscleblind-like 1 Is Necessary For Mammalian Cardiomyocyte Maturation.
DNA methyltransferase 1 (DNMT1) promotes cyst growth and epigenetic age acceleration in autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease.
Key_Finding: MBNL1是ADPKD中与表观遗传时钟加速相关的五个基因之一，其甲基化状态可能不仅预测表观遗传年龄加速，还促进疾病进展。

Title: CaMKIIβ deregulation contributes to neuromuscular junction destabilization in Myotonic Dystrophy type I.
Key_Finding: MBNL1缺失通过CaMKIIβ依赖和非依赖机制扰乱突触基因调控和肌肉对去神经的反应，可能导致神经肌肉接头不稳定和肌肉功能障碍。

Title: Involvement of circRNA Regulators MBNL1 and QKI in the Progression of Esophageal Squamous Cell Carcinoma.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在食管鳞状细胞癌中发挥抑癌作用，其缺失促进癌细胞迁移、侵袭、增殖和肿瘤生长，可作为潜在生物标志物和治疗靶点。

Title: A 3'-pre-tRNA-derived small RNA tRF-1-Ser regulated by 25(OH)D promotes proliferation and stemness by inhibiting the function of MBNL1 in breast cancer.
Key_Finding: tRF-1-Ser通过阻碍MBNL1的核转位抑制其功能，在乳腺癌进展中起关键作用，并可能成为新的治疗靶点。

Title: Studying the Effect of MBNL1 and MBNL2 Loss in Skeletal Muscle Regeneration.
Key_Finding: MBNL1缺失本身不足以解释强直性肌营养不良1型中骨骼肌再生缺陷，提示除可变剪接异常外还有其他因素起关键作用。

Title: MBNL1 Regulates Programmed Postnatal Switching Between Regenerative and Differentiated Cardiac States.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过稳定成年心肌细胞mRNA，调控心肌细胞成熟状态、从增生到肥大的发育转换以及再生潜力，是心肌细胞分化状态的关键调节因子。

Title: Statement of Retraction: Long non-coding RNA muscleblind like splicing regulator 1 antisense RNA 1 (LncRNA MBNL1-AS1) promotes the progression of acute myocardial infarction by regulating the microRNA-132-3p/SRY-related high-mobility-group box 4 (SOX4) axis.
Functional requirement of alternative splicing in epithelial-mesenchymal transition of pancreatic circulating tumor.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过可变剪接独立于基因表达变化调控细胞命运，并影响上皮-间质转化过程中的剪接模式。

Title: Erythromycin for myotonic dystrophy type 1: a multicentre, randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled, phase 2 trial.
Key_Finding: 红霉素治疗能改善DM1患者中MBNL1的异常剪接，显示出初步的安全性和疗效。

Title: Mutation of two intronic nucleotides alters RNA structure and dynamics inhibiting MBNL1 and RBFOX1 regulated splicing of the Insulin Receptor.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控胰岛素受体基因外显子11的可变剪接，其功能受RBFOX1结合位点突变影响，揭示了RNA结构动态变化在剪接调控中的关键作用。

Title: MyeloDB: a multi-omics resource for multiple myeloma.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为多发性骨髓瘤的潜在药物靶点。

Title: Identification of central genes for endometriosis through integration of single-cell RNA sequencing and bulk RNA sequencing analysis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为子宫内膜异位症中与组织干细胞标志物相关的关键核心基因，具有作为诊断标志物和治疗靶点的潜力。

Title: LD block disorder-specific pleiotropic roles of novel CRHR1 in type 2 diabetes and depression disorder comorbidity.
Disease_Type: Major depressive disorder (MDD) and type 2 diabetes (T2D)
Key_Finding: CRHR1基因在家族性MDD和T2D中表现出多效性连锁/连锁不平衡/关联，对MDD的贡献强于T2D，可能先于T2D发病，提示MDD-T2D共病的新分子基础临床实体。

Title: FMRP deficiency leads to multifactorial dysregulation of splicing and mislocalization of MBNL1 to the cytoplasm.
Key_Finding: FMRP通过调控Mbnl1 mRNA的翻译和自身剪接，影响MBNL1的核质分布，进而导致下游RNA剪接失调，这在脆性X综合征中起关键作用。

Title: A comprehensive cuproptosis score and associated gene signatures reveal prognostic and immunological features of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为IPF患者预后相关的基因标志物之一，与铜死亡评分共同构建的列线图在IPF预后和诊断中具有可靠的临床应用价值。

Title: Identification of mitochondria-related action targets of quercetin in melanoma cells.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为槲皮素在黑色素瘤中可能的作用靶点之一，为靶向治疗提供新策略。

Title: Msi2 enhances muscle dysfunction in a myotonic dystrophy type 1 mouse model.
Key_Finding: MSI2过表达通过诱导自噬通量和关键自噬蛋白表达，导致肌肉萎缩和功能减弱，这一过程独立于MBNL1、MBNL2和Celf1蛋白水平的变化。

Title: Cardiac involvement in patient-specific induced pluripotent stem cells of myotonic dystrophy type 1: unveiling the impact of voltage-gated sodium channels.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1中被CUG重复序列隔离，导致SCN5A等基因的错误剪接，进而引起心肌细胞电生理异常和心律失常。

Title: Peptide-conjugated antimiRs improve myotonic dystrophy type 1 phenotypes by promoting endogenous MBNL1 expression.
Key_Finding: 通过抑制miR-23b和miR-218来增强MBNL1表达，可改善强直性肌营养不良1型的分子、组织病理和功能表型，为治疗提供新策略。

Title: Bidirectional Transcription at the PPP2R2B Gene Locus in Spinocerebellar Ataxia Type 12.
Key_Finding: MBNL1过表达可减少PPP2R2B-AS1转录本通过重复相关非ATG翻译在丙氨酸开放阅读框中的翻译，从而可能缓解SCA12的病理过程。

Title: MBNL1‑AS1 attenuates tumor cell proliferation by regulating the miR‑29c‑3p/BVES signal in colorectal cancer.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过作为竞争性内源RNA吸附miR-29c-3p来增强BVES mRNA的稳定性，从而抑制结直肠癌细胞的增殖。

Title: MiR-375 promotes cisplatin sensitivity of lung adenocarcinoma.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为miR-375的靶基因，参与调控肺腺癌的顺铂敏感性。

Title: Cell-type specific regulator RBPMS switches alternative splicing via higher-order oligomerization and heterotypic interactions with other splicing regulators.
Key_Finding: MBNL1与RBPMS等广泛表达的剪接共调节因子相互作用，促进稳定细胞特异性调控复合物的组装，从而调控平滑肌细胞特异性可变剪接。

Title: A Novel Circ_Arf3/miR-452-5p/Mbnl1 Axis Regulates Proliferation and Expression of Fibrosis-Related Proteins of Mouse Mesangial Cells Under High Glucose.
Key_Finding: MBNL1是miR-452-5p的直接靶点，circ_Arf3通过miR-452-5p调控MBNL1表达，从而抑制高糖诱导的肾小球系膜细胞增殖和纤维化。

Title: Chromosomal Aberration t(14;17)(q32;q21) Simultaneously Activates HOXB5 and miR10a in Triple-Hit B-Cell Lymphoma.
Key_Finding: MBNL1与BCL6基因融合，是B细胞淋巴瘤中三打击淋巴瘤的遗传特征之一，具有诊断和预后意义。

Title: Muscleblind-like proteins use modular domains to localize RNAs by riding kinesins and docking to membranes.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过其锌指结构域与驱动蛋白Kif1bα和Kif1c特异性结合，并通过其非结构化羧基末端锚定在膜上，调控RNA的亚细胞定位，其功能紊乱会导致mRNA定位异常。

Title: Alternative Splicing Outcomes Across an RNA-Binding Protein Concentration Gradient.
Key_Finding: MBNL1调控的可变剪接排除事件需要更高浓度的MBNL1蛋白，且YGCY基序的多种排列可产生相似的剪接结果，表明剪接调控涉及复杂的相互作用网络。

Title: Block or degrade? Balancing on- and off-target effects of antisense strategies against transcripts with expanded triplet repeats in DM1.
Key_Finding: 在强直性肌营养不良1型中，MBNL1蛋白的释放和剪接校正功能对于ASO疗法的有效性至关重要，其中重复序列阻断剂在MBNL1蛋白置换和剪接校正方面表现更优。

Title: BlockmiR AONs as Site-Specific Therapeutic MBNL Modulation in Myotonic Dystrophy 2D and 3D Muscle Cells and HSA<sup>LR</sup> Mice.
Key_Finding: 通过阻断miRNA-23b和miRNA-218的结合位点，增加MBNL1蛋白表达，从而挽救DM1中的错误剪接、改善肌肉功能和组织学表型。

Title: Network model integrated with multi-omic data predicts MBNL1 signals that drive myofibroblast activation.
Key_Finding: MBNL1是心脏伤口愈合和肌成纤维细胞活化的核心调控因子，通过调控p38 MAPK、Hippo、Runx1和Sox9等信号通路影响纤维化网络机制。

Title: Bidirectional transcription at the PPP2R2B gene locus in spinocerebellar ataxia type 12.
Key_Finding: MBNL1过表达可减少PPP2R2B-AS1转录本通过RAN翻译产生的毒性，提示其在SCA12发病机制中的潜在调控作用。

Title: Splicing factors in the heart: Uncovering shared and unique targets.
Key_Finding: MBNL1与QKI、RBM24共同调控心脏关键基因的可变剪接，其表达变异与心力衰竭患者下游靶基因的异常剪接相关，可能参与疾病机制。

Title: MBNL1 regulates programmed postnatal switching between regenerative and differentiated cardiac states.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过全转录组调控RNA稳定性，作为心肌细胞再生与成熟状态之间的关键开关，调节心肌细胞分化状态和再生潜能。

Title: Elucidation of the Landscape of Alternatively Spliced Genes and Features in the Dorsal Striatum of Aggressive/Aggression-Deprived Mice in the Model of Chronic Social Conflicts.
Key_Finding: MBNL1作为神经特异性剪接因子，在攻击性小鼠中上调，参与cAMP信号通路基因的可变剪接调控，影响突触可塑性和神经发育。

Title: LncRNA MBNL1-AS1 knockdown increases the sensitivity of hepatocellular carcinoma to tripterine by regulating miR-708-5p-mediated glycolysis.
Key_Finding: LncRNA MBNL1-AS1通过调控miR-708-5p相关的糖酵解，增加肝细胞癌细胞的雷公藤红素耐药性。

Title: Loss of MBNL1-mediated retrograde BDNF signaling in the myotonic dystrophy brain.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控BDNF-TrkB逆行运输信号通路，参与强直性肌营养不良1型（DM1）脑组织病理表型的形成。

Title: LncRNA MBNL1-AS1 Suppresses Cell Proliferation and Metastasis of Pancreatic Adenocarcinoma through Targeting Carcinogenic miR-301b-3p.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过下调miR-301b-3p发挥肿瘤抑制作用，抑制胰腺癌细胞的增殖、迁移和上皮间质转化。

Title: Transcriptome profiling of skeletal muscles from Korean patients with Bethlem myopathy.
Key_Finding: 该研究发现MBNL1-AS1在Bethlem肌病患者的骨骼肌中显著下调，提示非编码RNA可能参与该疾病的病理机制。

Title: Vorinostat Improves Myotonic Dystrophy Type 1 Splicing Abnormalities in DM1 Muscle Cell Lines and Skeletal Muscle from a DM1 Mouse Model.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1中被异常CTG重复序列捕获，导致多种mRNA的可变剪接失调，是疾病发病机制的关键因素；vorinostat通过减少RNA foci恢复MBNL1功能，改善剪接异常，有望成为DM1的新疗法。

Title: A computational map of the human-SARS-CoV-2 protein-RNA interactome predicted at single-nucleotide resolution.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为SARS-CoV-2感染中潜在的临床生物标志物，有助于理解病毒劫持宿主细胞通路的机制。

Title: MBNL1-AS1 Promotes Hypoxia-Induced Myocardial Infarction via the miR-132-3p/RAB14/CAMTA1 Axis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过ceRNA机制调控miR-132-3p，进而上调RAB14和CAMTA1表达，影响心肌细胞存活与凋亡，是心肌梗死的潜在治疗靶点。

Title: Application of Antisense Conjugates for the Treatment of Myotonic Dystrophy Type 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被重复序列置换是肌强直性营养不良1型的潜在治疗靶点，反义疗法通过阻断此机制可纠正疾病表型。

Title: Muscleblind-like 2 knockout shifts adducin 1 isoform expression and alters dendritic spine dynamics of cortical neurons during brain development.
Key_Finding: MBNL2通过调控ADD1的可变剪接维持树突棘动态平衡，其异常剪接可能导致强直性肌营养不良的脑部病理。

Title: A Virus-Packageable CRISPR System Identifies Host Dependency Factors Co-Opted by Multiple HIV-1 Strains.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为HIV复制过程中的宿主依赖因子，可能参与病毒生命周期，但具体调控机制未在摘要中明确。

Title: Construction of a ferroptosis scoring system and identification of LINC01572 as a novel ferroptosis suppressor in lung adenocarcinoma.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1被纳入基于铁死亡相关lncRNA的预后风险模型，对肺腺癌具有预测价值。

Title: Exosome-Delivered circSTAU2 Inhibits the Progression of Gastric Cancer by Targeting the miR-589/CAPZA1 Axis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1作为circSTAU2的上游RNA结合蛋白，显著影响circSTAU2的环化和表达，从而通过miR-589/CAPZA1轴抑制胃癌进展。

Title: Establishment of quantitative and consistent in vitro skeletal muscle pathological models of myotonic dystrophy type 1 using patient-derived iPSCs.
Key_Finding: 该研究建立了基于人类诱导多能干细胞（iPSCs）的强健DM1体外骨骼肌细胞模型，能够定量评估核内MBNL1聚集及其下游剪接缺陷，为DM1药物发现提供了有前景的平台。

Title: Analysis of Long Noncoding RNAs-Related Regulatory Mechanisms in Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy Using a Disease-Related lncRNA-mRNA Pathway Network.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1作为差异表达的长链非编码RNA，可能通过NOD样受体信号通路和癌症中的蛋白聚糖通路在DMD的发生发展中发挥重要作用。

Title: Alternative splicing mediates the compensatory upregulation of MBNL2 upon MBNL1 loss-of-function.
Key_Finding: MBNL1缺失通过增加Mbnl2外显子6和9的可变剪接，上调其旁系同源物MBNL2的表达，从而在肌强直性营养不良1型中发挥功能补偿作用。

Title: Cognate RNA-Binding Modes by the Alternative-Splicing Regulator MBNL1 Inferred from Molecular Dynamics.
Key_Finding: MBNL1的四个锌指结构域通过不同的结构采样和动态行为调控选择性剪接，其局部运动影响RNA结合亲和力和特异性。

Title: Calcitriol increases MBNL1 expression and alleviates myotonic dystrophy phenotypes in HSA<sup>LR</sup> mouse models.
Key_Finding: 骨化三醇通过激活MBNL1启动子上调其表达，改善DM1小鼠模型的肌肉力量和异常剪接，提示其作为DM1潜在治疗策略。

Title: Down-Regulation of lncRNA MBNL1-AS1 Promotes Tumor Stem Cell-like Characteristics and Prostate Cancer Progression through miR-221-3p/CDKN1B/C-myc Axis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过竞争性结合miR-221-3p调控CDKN1B，抑制Wnt信号通路，从而影响前列腺癌干细胞的恶性进展。

Title: The mechanism of BUD13 m6A methylation mediated MBNL1-phosphorylation by CDK12 regulating the vasculogenic mimicry in glioblastoma cells.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过BUD13/CDK12/MBNL1轴调控胶质母细胞瘤的血管生成拟态形成，其过表达可抑制VM形成，为GBM治疗提供潜在靶点。

Title: Sustainable recovery of MBNL activity in autoregulatory feedback loop in myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: 设计了一种自调节的MBNL1过表达系统，通过调控ATP2A1前体mRNA中的可变外显子剪接，在DM1模型中改善异常剪接模式，避免过度激活带来的代谢风险。

Title: Peptide-Conjugated PMOs for the Treatment of Myotonic Dystrophy.
Key_Finding: 该研究开发了肽-磷酰二胺吗啉寡核苷酸（P-PMOs），能有效增强反义寡核苷酸在骨骼肌的渗透，并在分子和功能水平上纠正肌强直性营养不良1型（DM1）的骨骼肌表型。

Title: Dynamic docking of small molecules targeting RNA CUG repeats causing myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被扩展的CUG重复RNA结合而功能受损，导致肌强直性营养不良1型，研究开发了基于物理的动态对接方法以设计靶向RNA的小分子药物来抑制MBNL1结合并改善疾病缺陷。

Title: Investigation of Transcriptome Patterns in Endometrial Cancers from Obese and Lean Women.
Key_Finding: 该研究发现MBNL1-AS1在子宫内膜癌组织中表达异常，可能作为预后生物标志物或治疗靶点。

Title: STAT3/miR-130b-3p/MBNL1 feedback loop regulated by mTORC1 signaling promotes angiogenesis and tumor growth.
Disease_Type: Head and Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma (HNSCC)
Key_Finding: MBNL1作为miR-130b-3p的直接靶点，在STAT3/miR-130b-3p/MBNL1反馈环路中发挥关键作用，调控mTORC1介导的血管生成和肿瘤进展。

Title: MBNL1 and MRTF-A form a positive feedback loop in regulating the migration of esophageal cancer cells.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过稳定MRTF-A mRNA促进食管癌细胞的迁移，并与MRTF-A形成正反馈调控环路，可能是食管癌转移的重要调节因子和潜在治疗靶点。

Title: Peripheral Blood DNA Methylation Profiles Do Not Predict Endoscopic Post-Operative Recurrence in Crohn's Disease Patients.
Key_Finding: MBNL1基因在克罗恩病患者术后内镜复发中表现出高甲基化，可能参与肠道纤维化过程，但外周血白细胞DNA甲基化整体差异有限，不适合作为预测工具。

Title: The MBNL1/circNTRK2/PAX5 pathway regulates aerobic glycolysis in glioblastoma cells by encoding a novel protein NTRK2-243aa.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过结合NTRK2 pre-mRNA促进circNTRK2表达，进而调控胶质母细胞瘤糖酵解和肿瘤生长。

Title: Combinatorial treatment with exercise and AICAR potentiates the rescue of myotonic dystrophy type 1 mouse muscles in a sex-specific manner.
Key_Finding: 研究发现，运动与AICAR联合激活AMPK能协同减轻DM1小鼠肌肉中CUGexp RNA核内聚集，逆转MBNL1隔离并纠正致病性可变剪接事件，且对雌性小鼠效果更显著。

Title: Identification of a novel interplaying loop of PPARγ and respective lncRNAs are involved in colorectal cancer progress.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS作为受PPARγ激活调控的lncRNA，可能参与结肠癌中PPARγ的功能和活性机制。

Title: Glucocorticoids and glucolipotoxicity alter the DNA methylome and function of human EndoC-βH1 cells.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在β细胞功能中可能通过DNA甲基化变化参与调控，但具体机制未明确。

Title: Myocardin regulates exon usage in smooth muscle cells through induction of splicing regulatory factors.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在平滑肌细胞分化中作为MYOCD-SRF调控的可变剪接程序的一部分，参与调控ACTN1等基因的剪接事件。

Title: Pharmacotherapy alleviates pathological changes in human direct reprogrammed neuronal cell model of myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在强直性肌营养不良1型神经元模型中调控多个基因的可变剪接异常，红霉素治疗可部分挽救这些剪接缺陷。

Title: Analysis of the lncRNA-Associated Competing Endogenous RNA (ceRNA) Network for Tendinopathy.
Key_Finding: 该研究通过构建lncRNA相关的ceRNA网络，识别了与肌腱病相关的特征性lncRNAs，特别是MIR133A1HG和C10orf71-AS1，揭示了它们在调控TPM3、COL4A3和COL4A4等基因表达中的竞争性内源RNA机制。

Title: Understanding Myoblast Differentiation Pathways When Cultured on Electroactive Scaffolds through Proteomic Analysis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在负电荷表面促进C2C12细胞分化过程中上调，参与骨骼肌发育相关蛋白表达调控。

Title: Identification of RBMX as a splicing regulator in Parkinsonian mimetic induced alternative splicing of α-synuclein.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被识别为可能参与帕金森病中α-突触核蛋白外显子5跳跃的RNA结合蛋白之一，但其具体功能未在摘要中明确阐述。

Title: Mice lacking MBNL1 and MBNL2 exhibit sudden cardiac death and molecular signatures recapitulating myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: 心肌细胞中完全敲除MBNL1/2是导致致死性心律失常和猝死的必要条件，并揭示了强直性肌营养不良心脏发病的潜在机制。

Title: LncRNA MBNL1-AS1 Represses Proliferation and Cancer Stem-Like Properties of Breast Cancer through MBNL1-AS1/ZFP36/CENPA Axis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过直接结合ZFP36降低CENPA mRNA稳定性，从而抑制乳腺癌细胞增殖和干细胞特性。

Title: Comprehensive Analysis of miRNA-Mediated Regulatory Network and Identification of Prognosis Biomarkers in Rectal Cancer.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过MBNL1-AS1、miR-429和LONRF2的ceRNA网络调控，改善直肠癌患者的总生存期。

Title: The dynamic alteration of transcriptional regulation by crucial TFs during tumorigenesis of gastric cancer.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在胃癌发生过程中被CREB1差异调控，可能具有治疗靶点潜力。

Title: Maturation of hiPSC-derived cardiomyocytes promotes adult alternative splicing of SCN5A and reveals changes in sodium current associated with cardiac arrhythmia.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过上调驱动SCN5A基因的成年型可变剪接，促进hiPSC-CMs的成熟，从而揭示成年外显子中致病突变的功能影响。

Title: RNA-binding proteins in diabetic microangiopathy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在糖尿病微血管病变（特别是糖尿病肾病）中具有潜在的治疗作用。

Title: Functional Impact and Regulation of Alternative Splicing in Mouse Heart Development and Disease.
Key_Finding: MBNL1的上调主要驱动心脏发育过程中的可变剪接变化，而疾病状态下的剪接变化则由PTBP1等复杂调控网络主导。

Title: LncRNA MBNL1-AS1 represses gastric cancer progression via the TGF-β pathway by modulating miR-424-5p/Smad7 axis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过调控miR-424-5p/Smad7轴抑制胃癌细胞增殖、迁移和侵袭，并激活TGF-β/EMT通路，可能作为胃癌治疗的潜在靶点。

Title: Proof of concept of peptide-linked blockmiR-induced MBNL functional rescue in myotonic dystrophy type 1 mouse model.
Key_Finding: 通过靶向MBNL1 3' UTR的miR-23b结合位点，使用blockmiRs可增加MBNL1蛋白表达，改善DM1小鼠的肌肉力量和下游剪接表型。

Title: A comprehensive atlas of fetal splicing patterns in the brain of adult myotonic dystrophy type 1 patients.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1患者中调控可变剪接，导致成年大脑中恢复胎儿剪接模式，与CELF1活性失衡相关。

Title: Functional Polymorphism in Pak1-3' Untranslated Region Alters Skin Tumor Susceptibility by Alternative Polyadenylation.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过结合并调控Pak1基因3'非翻译区的多聚腺苷酸化，影响转录本长度和肿瘤发生。

Title: Rapid Determination of MBNL1 Protein Levels by Quantitative Dot Blot for the Evaluation of Antisense Oligonucleotides in Myotonic Dystrophy Myoblasts.
Key_Finding: 开发了一种基于定量点印迹的高通量方法，用于在48小时内检测患者来源成肌细胞中MBNL1蛋白的绝对含量。

Title: Evaluating the cytotoxicity and pathogenicity of multi-walled carbon nanotube through weighted gene co-expression network analysis: a nanotoxicogenomics study.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在MWCNT暴露后的小鼠基因表达分析中被鉴定为与免疫、炎症和蛋白质代谢通路相关的基因之一，可能作为潜在生物标志物。

Title: MBNL1 drives dynamic transitions between fibroblasts and myofibroblasts in cardiac wound healing.
Key_Finding: MBNL1作为转录后开关，通过控制成纤维细胞状态可塑性，在心脏伤口愈合中调节纤维化反应。

Title: Novel Insights into the Stemness and Immune Privilege of Mesenchymal Stem Cells from Human Wharton Jelly by Single-Cell RNA Sequencing.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为沃顿胶间充质干细胞中干细胞亚群的标记基因之一，但未明确其具体调控功能。

Title: Reversal of RNA toxicity in myotonic dystrophy via a decoy RNA-binding protein with high affinity for expanded CUG repeats.
Key_Finding: MBNL1的功能丧失导致可变剪接缺陷，通过工程化RBP诱饵释放被核内RNA病灶隔离的MBNL1，可恢复其活性并纠正DM1的转录组特征，为肌强直性营养不良提供治疗策略。

Title: Tumour-suppressing functions of the lncRNA MBNL1-AS1/miR-889-3p/KLF9 axis in human breast cancer cells.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过miR-889-3p/KLF9轴抑制乳腺癌细胞的增殖、侵袭、迁移和糖酵解，可能作为乳腺癌诊断的潜在生物标志物。

Title: Up-regulation of long noncoding RNA MBNL1-AS1 suppresses breast cancer progression by modulating miR-423-5p/CREBZF axis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过上调miR-423-5p靶向的CREBZF发挥抑癌作用，调控乳腺癌发展。

Title: Antisense oligonucleotides as a potential treatment for brain deficits observed in myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1中通过ASO靶向突变DMPK mRNA，恢复其核内分布并纠正异常剪接，为治疗脑部缺陷提供可行性。

Title: Long non-coding RNA muscleblind like splicing regulator 1 antisense RNA 1 (LncRNA MBNL1-AS1) promotes the progression of acute myocardial infarction by regulating the microRNA-132-3p/SRY-related high-mobility-group box 4 (SOX4) axis.
Key_Finding: LncRNA MBNL1-AS1通过调控miR-132-3p/SOX4轴加重急性心肌梗死的心肌损伤和细胞凋亡，是潜在的治疗靶点。

Title: Identification and validation of long non-coding RNA associated ceRNAs in intrauterine adhesion.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1作为关键lncRNA参与子宫粘连的ceRNA网络调控，可能通过cGMP-PKG信号通路和离子转运影响疾病发生。

Title: Identification of an m6A Regulators-Mediated Prognosis Signature For Survival Prediction and Its Relevance to Immune Infiltration in Melanoma.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被纳入一个由12个基因组成的m6A相关风险特征中，用于预测黑色素瘤患者的预后和免疫治疗反应，低风险组（包含MBNL1）预后较好且可能受益于免疫检查点阻断疗法。

Title: Mbnl1 and Mbnl2 regulate brain structural integrity in mice.
Key_Finding: MBNL1失活与MBNL2共同导致小鼠全脑体积减少、脑室扩大和区域灰白质体积减少，为先天性DM1表型强化和脑结构变异提供分子解释。

Title: NFIB-Mediated lncRNA PVT1 Aggravates Laryngeal Squamous Cell Carcinoma Progression via the miR-1301-3p/MBNL1 Axis.
Key_Finding: lncRNA PVT1通过海绵吸附miR-1301-3p促进MBNL1表达，从而调控喉鳞状细胞癌的细胞增殖、凋亡及对NK细胞的敏感性。

Title: Retraction Note: Downregulation of the long noncoding RNA MBNL1-AS1 protects sevoflurane-pretreated mice against ischemia-reperfusion injury by targeting KCNMA1.
Novel genetic variants associated with mortality after unrelated donor allogeneic hematopoietic cell transplantation.
Disease_Type: Acute Myeloid Leukemia, Myelodysplastic Syndrome, Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia
Key_Finding: MBNL1基因变异与异基因造血干细胞移植后一年总生存率相关，提示其作为非HLA遗传风险因素可能影响移植预后。

Title: Construction and characterization of rectal cancer-related lncRNA-mRNA ceRNA network reveals prognostic biomarkers in rectal cancer.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-SA1作为枢纽节点参与构建直肠癌相关的lncRNA-mRNA网络，该网络与癌症通路高度相关并具有显著的预后预测能力。

Title: The Effect of Renalase rs2576178 and rs10887800 Polymorphisms on Ischemic Stroke Susceptibility in Young Patients (<50 Years): A Case-Control Study and In Silico Analysis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1蛋白结合位点缺失可能与缺血性卒中易感性相关，但具体机制未明确。

Title: Defined D-hexapeptides bind CUG repeats and rescue phenotypes of myotonic dystrophy myotubes in a Drosophila model of the disease.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1中调控外显子剪接，其功能恢复可改善疾病相关的肌肉萎缩和功能缺陷。

Title: Musashi-2 contributes to myotonic dystrophy muscle dysfunction by promoting excessive autophagy through miR-7 biogenesis repression.
Key_Finding: 研究发现MSI2沉默可显著上调MBNL1，提示MBNL1在DM1肌肉功能障碍中可能通过间接机制参与调控。

Title: High-throughput kinome-RNAi screen identifies protein kinase R activator (PACT) as a novel genetic modifier of CUG foci integrity in myotonic dystrophy type 1 (DM1).
Key_Finding: MBNL1被异常DMPK mRNA聚集的核内病灶隔离，导致下游剪接异常，是强直性肌营养不良1型的关键致病机制。

Title: Preclinical characterization of antagomiR-218 as a potential treatment for myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: 通过抑制miR-218上调MBNL1表达，可改善DM1疾病模型的分子和功能表型，为治疗提供了新靶点。

Title: The Regulatory Role of Both MBNL1 and MBNL1-AS1 in Several Common Cancers.
Disease_Type: Myotonic Dystrophy, Breast Cancer, Leukemia, Stomach Cancer, Esophageal Cancer, Glioma, Huntington's Disease, Cervical Cancer, Colorectal Cancer, Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
Key_Finding: MBNL1在多种肿瘤中作为重要的转移和生长调节因子，其表达水平变化与肿瘤进展相关，为肿瘤治疗提供了新靶点。

Title: Comprehensive transcriptome-wide analysis of spliceopathy correction of myotonic dystrophy using CRISPR-Cas9 in iPSCs-derived cardiomyocytes.
Key_Finding: MBNL1参与纠正DM1心肌细胞中由CTG重复扩增引起的异常可变剪接，逆转心脏功能障碍相关的剪接病理。

Title: The pioneer transcription factors Foxa1 and Foxa2 regulate alternative RNA splicing during thymocyte positive selection.
Key_Finding: MBNL1是Foxa1和Foxa2调控的剪接因子之一，参与T细胞阳性选择中的可变剪接调控，影响T细胞发育相关基因的表达。

Title: CRISPR gene editing in pluripotent stem cells reveals the function of MBNL proteins during human in vitro myogenesis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在人类肌生成晚期成熟过程中起关键作用，其功能缺失会重现DM1疾病特征，为治疗策略提供新靶点。

Title: The Aqueous Extract of Eucommia Leaves Promotes Proliferation, Differentiation, and Mineralization of Osteoblast-Like MC3T3-E1 Cells.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在杜仲叶水提物处理MC3T3-E1细胞时表达水平降低，可能参与抑制细胞增殖，但具体调控机制未明确。

Title: Zebrafish mbnl mutants model physical and molecular phenotypes of myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: 通过构建斑马鱼MBNL功能缺失模型，揭示了MBNL蛋白在调控可变剪接中的关键作用，为研究强直性肌营养不良的病理机制和药物测试提供了新工具。

Title: [Regulation of RNA Binding Protein Mbnl1 on Development of Mouse Embryonic Hematopoietic Stem Cells].
Key_Finding: 敲除RNA剪接因子Mbnl1不影响小鼠胚胎AGM区域造血干祖细胞的发育功能。

Title: A Druglike Small Molecule that Targets r(CCUG) Repeats in Myotonic Dystrophy Type 2 Facilitates Degradation by RNA Quality Control Pathways.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被异常RNA重复序列隔离导致功能丧失，进而引起其天然底物的可变剪接失调，这是强直性肌营养不良2型的致病机制。

Title: Non-invasive and high-throughput interrogation of exon-specific isoform expression.
Key_Finding: MBNL1是调控FOXP1基因外显子18b排除的关键因子，影响胚胎干细胞多能性维持。

Title: Global alternative splicing landscape of skeletal muscle atrophy induced by hindlimb unloading.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在废用性骨骼肌萎缩中显著上调，与可变剪接事件相关，提示其在肌肉萎缩发生中的新调控作用。

Title: MBNL1 Suppressed Cancer Metastatic of Skin Squamous Cell Carcinoma Via by TIAL1/MYOD1/Caspase-9/3 Signaling Pathways.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过TIAL1/MYOD1/Caspase-3信号通路抑制皮肤鳞状细胞癌的转移能力。

Title: Altered Expression of MBNL Family of Alternative Splicing Factors in Colorectal Cancer.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在结直肠癌中表达下调，导致FOXP1、EPB41L3和CD44基因的可变剪接模式向低分化表型转变，促进肿瘤生长和扩散。

Title: RNA-Associated Co-expression Network Identifies Novel Biomarkers for Digestive System Cancer.
Disease_Type: Colon Cancer, Esophageal Cancer (ESCC), Rectal Cancer, Gastric Cancer (GC), Rectosigmoid Junction Cancer
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为消化系统癌症（如结肠癌、食管癌等）预后相关的枢纽基因之一，可能作为这些疾病的生物标志物。

Title: [Effect of long non-coding RNA MBNL1-AS1 expression on prognosis of acute myeloid leukemia patients].
Key_Finding: 长链非编码RNA MBNL1-AS1低表达是急性髓系白血病患者独立的预后不良因素。

Title: RNA Splicing of the Abi1 Gene by MBNL1 contributes to macrophage-like phenotype modulation of vascular smooth muscle cell during atherogenesis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控Abi1基因的可变剪接，抑制血管平滑肌细胞向巨噬细胞样细胞转分化，从而减缓动脉粥样硬化进程。

Title: The GGC repeat expansion in NOTCH2NLC is associated with oculopharyngodistal myopathy type 3.
Key_Finding: MBNL1与p62共定位于OPDM肌肉样本的核内包涵体中，提示RNA功能获得机制可能在OPDM3的致病过程中起重要作用。

Title: hnRNP L is essential for myogenic differentiation and modulates myotonic dystrophy pathologies.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1中被CUG重复序列隔离，导致靶基因错误剪接，而药物ascochlorin可增加MBNL1表达并部分挽救剪接缺陷。

Title: Muscleblind-like 1 antisense RNA 1 inhibits cell proliferation, invasion, and migration of prostate cancer by sponging miR-181a-5p and regulating PTEN/PI3K/AKT/mTOR signaling.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过海绵吸附miR-181a-5p并调控PTEN/PI3K/AKT/mTOR通路，抑制前列腺癌的进展。

Title: A functional network of gastric-cancer-associated splicing events controlled by dysregulated splicing factors.
Key_Finding: MBNL1是胃癌中与肿瘤侵袭相关的异常可变剪接网络的关键调控因子，其敲低会驱动多个肿瘤相关可变剪接事件的变化并影响细胞迁移。

Title: iPSC-derived cardiomyocytes from patients with myotonic dystrophy type 1 have abnormal ion channel functions and slower conduction velocities.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1中通过调控SCN5A和CaV1.2的可变剪接，导致钠和钙离子通道功能障碍，影响心脏动作电位和传导。

Title: Targeted splice sequencing reveals RNA toxicity and therapeutic response in myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在强直性肌营养不良1型中调控可变剪接，其功能缺失或CUG重复序列表达导致剪接失调，可作为评估治疗效果的敏感生物标志物。

Title: LncRNA MBLN1-AS1 inhibits the progression of retinoblastoma through targeting miR-338-5p-Wnt/β-catenin signaling pathway.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过靶向miR-338-5p抑制Wnt/β-catenin信号通路，从而在视网膜母细胞瘤中发挥抗肿瘤作用。

Title: Global analysis of RNA-protein interactions in TNF-α induced alternative splicing in metabolic disorders.
Key_Finding: MBNL1是受TNF-α转录调控的RNA结合蛋白之一，参与代谢综合征相关基因的可变剪接调控。

Title: Design of novel small molecule base-pair recognizers of toxic CUG RNA transcripts characteristics of DM1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在强直性肌营养不良1型中被毒性DMPK转录本隔离，导致其功能丧失，而新化合物1a能稳定毒性转录本并释放MBNL1，恢复其正常活性，为治疗提供了新策略。

Title: Long Noncoding RNAs in the Progression of Atherosclerosis: An Integrated Analysis Based on Competing Endogenous RNA Theory.
Key_Finding: 该研究通过构建lncRNA-mRNA网络，识别出6个在动脉粥样硬化进展中可能作为竞争性内源RNA发挥重要作用的lncRNA，为心血管事件提供了新的生物标志物或治疗靶点。

Title: RNA structure probing to characterize RNA-protein interactions on low abundance pre-mRNA in living cells.
Key_Finding: 开发了一种富集低丰度靶标的方法，结合诱导表达技术，用于研究MBNL1在细胞环境中对其自身pre-mRNA的自调控事件。

Title: MBNL1 regulates isoproterenol-induced myocardial remodelling in vitro and in vivo.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过稳定Myocardin mRNA促进ISO诱导的心肌肥厚和纤维化，并可能通过TNF-α信号诱导心肌细胞凋亡，是心肌重塑早期诊断和治疗的潜在靶点。

Title: Inhibition of lncRNA MAAT Controls Multiple Types of Muscle Atrophy by cis- and trans-Regulatory Actions.
Key_Finding: lncMAAT通过顺式调控模块增加MBNL1的表达，从而改善多种肌肉萎缩模型。

Title: The hallmarks of myotonic dystrophy type 1 muscle dysfunction.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在强直性肌营养不良1型(DM1)中作为关键剪接调控因子被毒性DMPK RNA隔离而功能受损，导致剪接异常，这是DM1发病机制的核心环节。

Title: Tumorigenic de-differentiation: the alternative splicing way.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过可变剪接机制驱动肿瘤性去分化，与常见癌症类型的不良预后、复发和转移相关。

Title: Identification of Long Noncoding RNAs Involved in Differentiation and Survival of Vascular Smooth Muscle Cells.
Key_Finding: 该研究未直接涉及MBNL1，而是发现lncRNA FOXC2-AS1通过Akt/mTOR和Notch信号通路调控血管平滑肌细胞的增殖、凋亡和分化，影响血管稳态和相关疾病。

Title: The SRSF3-MBNL1-Acin1 circuit constitutes an emerging axis to lessen DNA fragmentation in colorectal cancer via an alternative splicing mechanism.
Key_Finding: SRSF3-MBNL1-Acin1轴通过调控可变剪接影响结直肠癌细胞的凋亡特征和转录后事件。

Title: The Alternative Splicing Factor, MBNL1, Inhibits Glioblastoma Tumor Initiation and Progression by Reducing Hypoxia-Induced Stemness.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在胶质母细胞瘤中通过调控可变剪接抑制肿瘤干细胞自我更新和肿瘤进展，缺氧条件下其活性被抑制促进肿瘤生长。

Title: MBNL1-Associated Mitochondrial Dysfunction and Apoptosis in C2C12 Myotubes and Mouse Skeletal Muscle.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控PGC-1α表达，在骨骼肌衰老相关的线粒体功能障碍和细胞凋亡中起关键作用，影响肌肉萎缩。

Title: Therapeutic Potential of AntagomiR-23b for Treating Myotonic Dystrophy.
Key_Finding: 通过抑制miR-23b上调MBNL1蛋白表达，可剂量依赖性地挽救DM1小鼠的剪接异常、握力和肌强直，具有持久疗效。

Title: Three-dimensional imaging in myotonic dystrophy type 1: Linking molecular alterations with disease phenotype.
Target_Genes: DMPK, insulin receptor, sarcoplasmic reticulum Ca(2+)-ATPase 1
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1成肌细胞中被RNA foci隔离，但仅占其总表达的1%，且未导致可变剪接异常，表明其在该疾病病理中作用较小。

Title: MBNL1 reverses the proliferation defect of skeletal muscle satellite cells in myotonic dystrophy type 1 by inhibiting autophagy via the mTOR pathway.
Cell_Lines: DM1-04 iPSCs, DM1-03 iPSCs, DM1-13-3 iPSCs, primary SSCs
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过mTOR通路抑制自噬，从而逆转DM1中骨骼肌卫星细胞的增殖缺陷。

Title: Macrocyclization of a Ligand Targeting a Toxic RNA Dramatically Improves Potency.
Key_Finding: 大环化修饰能显著提高靶向RNA的小分子配体活性，通过增强对r(CUG)exp的亲和力和选择性，抑制其与MBNL1的有毒相互作用，从而改善DM1相关细胞缺陷。

Title: Publisher Correction: MBNL1 regulates essential alternative RNA splicing patterns in MLL-rearranged leukemia.
Key_Finding: 该摘要仅提及论文修正信息，未提供任何关于MBNL1的具体研究内容。

Title: Identification of functional long non-coding RNAs in gastric cancer by bioinformatics analysis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1是胃癌中差异表达的核心lncRNA之一，但本研究主要发现MIR100HG可作为胃癌的潜在预后因子和生物标志物。

Title: A tumor-associated splice-isoform of MAP2K7 drives dedifferentiation in MBNL1-low cancers via JNK activation.
Disease_Type: Breast Cancer, Lung Cancer, Stomach Cancer, Triple-Negative Breast Cancer
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控可变剪接（如MAP2K7∆exon2）抑制肿瘤去分化，其下调与多种癌症预后不良相关，并可作为JNK抑制剂治疗的生物标志物。

Title: The transcriptional repressor BCL11A promotes breast cancer metastasis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控ITGA6的可变剪接抑制乳腺癌细胞侵袭和转移，其表达被BCL11A抑制后促进三阴性乳腺癌的侵袭性表型。

Title: The Dimeric Form of 1,3-Diaminoisoquinoline Derivative Rescued the Mis-splicing of Atp2a1 and Clcn1 Genes in Myotonic Dystrophy Type 1 Mouse Model.
Key_Finding: JM642通过结合扩增的r(CUG)重复序列，在DM1细胞和小鼠模型中挽救MBNL1被隔离导致的Ldb3、Clcn1和Atp2a1基因的错误剪接，作为潜在治疗药物。

Title: Differences in splicing defects between the grey and white matter in myotonic dystrophy type 1 patients.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在强直性肌营养不良1型患者大脑中调控可变剪接，特别是在灰质和白质之间表现出差异，这可能与疾病对白质的影响相关。

Title: MBNL1 regulates essential alternative RNA splicing patterns in MLL-rearranged leukemia.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控DOT1L和SETD1A等基因的可变剪接，对MLL重排白血病的发生至关重要，其小分子抑制剂可选择性杀死白血病细胞，为靶向治疗提供新策略。

Title: Loss of MBNL1 induces RNA misprocessing in the thymus and peripheral blood.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在胸腺发育和功能中起关键作用，其缺失导致胸腺增生和RNA剪接异常，与肌强直性营养不良相关。

Title: Whole-transcriptome analysis reveals a potential hsa_circ_0001955/hsa_circ_0000977-mediated miRNA-mRNA regulatory sub-network in colorectal cancer.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为hsa_circ_0000977/miR-135b-5p轴在结直肠癌中的七个潜在下游靶基因之一，参与circRNA介导的ceRNA调控网络。

Title: Resveratrol corrects aberrant splicing of RYR1 pre-mRNA and Ca2+ signal in myotonic dystrophy type 1 myotubes.
Key_Finding: 白藜芦醇通过纠正RYR1基因的异常剪接，恢复钙离子释放，为强直性肌营养不良1型提供潜在治疗策略。

Title: MiR-362-5p, Which Is Regulated by Long Non-Coding RNA MBNL1-AS1, Promotes the Cell Proliferation and Tumor Growth of Bladder Cancer by Targeting QKI.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过海绵吸附miR-362-5p调控其在膀胱癌中的表达和功能，从而影响肿瘤增殖。

Title: Precise Targeted Cleavage of a r(CUG) Repeat Expansion in Cells by Using a Small-Molecule-Deglycobleomycin Conjugate.
Key_Finding: DeglycoCugamycin通过选择性切割r(CUG)重复序列，改善强直性肌营养不良1型相关缺陷，同时避免DNA损伤。

Title: Muscleblind-like 2 controls the hypoxia response of cancer cells.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在缺氧条件下不参与调控，其同源蛋白MBNL2才是癌细胞适应缺氧的关键调节因子。

Title: Metformin Reduces the Senescence of Renal Tubular Epithelial Cells in Diabetic Nephropathy via the MBNL1/miR-130a-3p/STAT3 Pathway.
Key_Finding: 二甲双胍通过上调MBNL1表达，延长miR-130a-3p的半衰期，从而抑制STAT3表达，减轻糖尿病肾病中肾小管上皮细胞的衰老。

Title: Down-regulation of MBNL1-AS1 contributes to tumorigenesis of NSCLC via sponging miR-135a-5p.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过海绵吸附miR-135a-5p抑制NSCLC细胞增殖、迁移和侵袭，并促进细胞凋亡，可能成为治疗NSCLC的新靶点。

Title: HNRNPA1-induced spliceopathy in a transgenic mouse model of myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: CUG<sup>exp</sup> RNA通过异常表达CELF1和HNRNPA1等核RNA结合蛋白，拮抗MBNL活性，促进胎儿剪接模式，导致DM1疾病表现。

Title: Inhibition of cyclooxygenase-1 by nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs demethylates MeR2 enhancer and promotes Mbnl1 transcription in myogenic cells.
Key_Finding: COX-1抑制通过去甲基化MeR2增强子上调Mbnl1转录，为MBNL1的转录调控提供了新机制。

Title: A Toxic RNA Catalyzes the Cellular Synthesis of Its Own Inhibitor, Shunting It to Endogenous Decay Pathways.
Key_Finding: 小分子化合物通过破坏r(CCUG)exp-MBNL1复合物，减少内含子滞留，将释放的内含子r(CCUG)exp导向天然降解途径，从而挽救DM2相关细胞缺陷。

Title: Structure-Specific Cleavage of an RNA Repeat Expansion with a Dimeric Small Molecule Is Advantageous over Sequence-Specific Recognition by an Oligonucleotide.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM2中被r(CCUG)exp隔离导致剪接缺陷，而靶向RNA结构的小分子化合物比靶向序列的寡核苷酸更有效缓解缺陷，因为后者可能降低MBNL1等功能蛋白水平。

Title: Systemic Evaluation of Chimeric LNA/2'-O-Methyl Steric Blockers for Myotonic Dystrophy Type 1 Therapy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在强直性肌营养不良1型中调控可变剪接，其功能丧失导致剪接失调，但通过反义寡核苷酸系统递送抑制MBNL1隔离在治疗上极具挑战性。

Title: The interaction between 30b-5p miRNA and MBNL1 mRNA is involved in vascular smooth muscle cell differentiation in patients with coronary atherosclerosis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1受hsa-miR-30b-5p负调控，影响血管平滑肌细胞增殖和分化，可能参与冠状动脉疾病发病机制。

Title: miR-7 Restores Phenotypes in Myotonic Dystrophy Muscle Cells by Repressing Hyperactivated Autophagy.
Key_Finding: miR-7通过调控自噬和泛素-蛋白酶体系统改善DM1肌肉萎缩表型，其作用独立于MBNL1，提示miR-7恢复是潜在治疗靶点。

Title: Dosage effect of multiple genes accounts for multisystem disorder of myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1剂量减少与DMPK、SIX5和DMWD基因共同导致肌强直性营养不良1型（DM1）的复杂症状，包括成年型和先天性表型，为药物筛选提供了模型。

Title: Straightjacket/α2δ3 deregulation is associated with cardiac conduction defects in myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1失调导致心脏钙通道调控亚基α2δ3表达升高，引发传导缺陷，降低其水平可能预防DM1患者的心脏传导障碍。

Title: MBNL1 regulates resistance of HeLa cells to cisplatin via Nrf2.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过增加Cul3的mRNA稳定性上调Nrf2蛋白降解，从而调控HeLa细胞对顺铂的耐药性。

Title: LncRNA MBNL1-AS1 represses cell proliferation and enhances cell apoptosis via targeting miR-135a-5p/PHLPP2/FOXO1 axis in bladder cancer.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过靶向miR-135a/PHLPP2/FOXO1轴抑制膀胱癌细胞的增殖并促进凋亡，发挥肿瘤抑制作用。

Title: Increased Muscleblind levels by chloroquine treatment improve myotonic dystrophy type 1 phenotypes in in vitro and in vivo models.
Key_Finding: 氯喹通过上调MBNL1和MBNL2蛋白，改善DM1疾病模型中的可变剪接事件，恢复运动功能并延长生存期。

Title: Alternatively spliced MBNL1 isoforms exhibit differential influence on enhancing brown adipogenesis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过自调控机制调控其自身转录本和米色细胞相关剪接事件，参与米色脂肪细胞发育。

Title: Cell-type-specific dysregulation of RNA alternative splicing in short tandem repeat mouse knockin models of myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: 该研究发现MBNL1在强直性肌营养不良1型中通过调控RNA错误剪接，导致骨骼肌再生和脑脊液稳态失调，是早期致病事件。

Title: FISH Protocol for Myotonic Dystrophy Type 1 Cells.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被CUG扩展RNA病灶隔离，导致剪接因子功能丧失，是1型强直性肌营养不良的关键致病机制。

Title: Quantitative Studies of Muscleblind Proteins and Their Interaction With TCF4 RNA Foci Support Involvement in the Mechanism of Fuchs' Dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1和MBNL2被CUG重复RNA隔离导致剪接异常，可能是FECD发病机制的关键因素。

Title: Peptide-conjugated oligonucleotides evoke long-lasting myotonic dystrophy correction in patient-derived cells and mice.
Key_Finding: Pip6a-PMO-CAG通过靶向突变CUGexp-DMPK转录本，解除MBNL1剪接因子被核RNA病灶的有害隔离，从而逆转剪接缺陷和肌强直，在分子和功能水平上高效持久地纠正DM1相关表型。

Title: Gene Expression and Missplicing in the Corneal Endothelium of Patients With a TCF4 Trinucleotide Repeat Expansion Without Fuchs' Endothelial Corneal Dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在TCF4基因CTG三核苷酸重复扩增患者中的异常剪接与FECD疾病表型相关，正常剪接可能具有保护作用。

Title: Transplantation studies reveal internuclear transfer of toxic RNA in engrafted muscles of myotonic dystrophy 1 mice.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在肌强直性营养不良1型中因CUG重复RNA的隔离导致异常可变剪接，揭示了RNA在肌纤维核间传播的病理机制。

Title: Deprivation of Muscleblind-Like Proteins Causes Deficits in Cortical Neuron Distribution and Morphological Changes in Dendritic Spines and Postsynaptic Densities.
Key_Finding: MBNL1功能缺失导致神经元分布缺陷、树突形态异常和突触后结构改变，模拟强直性肌营养不良患者中未成熟和胎儿表型。

Title: Correction of Glycogen Synthase Kinase 3β in Myotonic Dystrophy 1 Reduces the Mutant RNA and Improves Postnatal Survival of DMSXL Mice.
Key_Finding: GSK3抑制剂tideglusib通过纠正GSK3β-CUGBP1通路，减少突变DMPK mRNA，并改善DM1小鼠模型的生存和神经运动功能。

Title: The RNA hairpin binder TRIM71 modulates alternative splicing by repressing MBNL1.
Key_Finding: TRIM71通过抑制MBNL1来维持胚胎剪接模式，从而调控干细胞命运。

Title: Gene-based genome-wide association studies and meta-analyses of conotruncal heart defects.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为圆锥动脉干心脏缺陷的候选基因之一，为先天性心脏缺陷的遗传机制提供了新线索。

Title: Long non-coding RNA MBNL1-AS1 regulates proliferation, migration, and invasion of cancer stem cells in colon cancer by interacting with MYL9 via sponging microRNA-412-3p.
Key_Finding: MBNL1-AS1通过竞争性结合miR-412-3p上调MYL9表达，抑制结肠癌干细胞增殖、迁移和侵袭，并促进凋亡，从而在结肠癌中发挥抑制作用。

Title: Anti-colorectal cancer biotargets and biological mechanisms of puerarin: Study of molecular networks.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为葛根素抗结直肠癌作用的潜在靶点之一，但具体调控机制未在摘要中明确阐述。

Title: Alternative splicing induces cytoplasmic localization of RBFOX2 protein in calcific tendinopathy.
Key_Finding: RBFOX2蛋白在钙化肌腱中定位于细胞质而非细胞核，导致其靶基因CHD2和MBNL1的可变剪接发生显著改变，这为理解钙化肌腱病的发病机制提供了新见解。

Title: (CTG)n repeat-mediated dysregulation of MBNL1 and MBNL2 expression during myogenesis in DM1 occurs already at the myoblast stage.
Key_Finding: MBNL1蛋白的细胞内分布发生定量和定性改变，是导致强直性肌营养不良1型骨骼肌问题的关键原因。

Title: microRNA-301b-3p downregulation underlies a novel inhibitory role of long non-coding RNA MBNL1-AS1 in non-small cell lung cancer.
Key_Finding: LncRNA MBNL1-AS1通过上调miR-301b-3p靶向的TGFBR2，抑制非小细胞肺癌中癌症干细胞的耐药性。

Title: MBNL1 overexpression is not sufficient to rescue the phenotypes in a mouse model of RNA toxicity.
Key_Finding: MBNL1过表达未能改善RNA毒性介导的骨骼肌功能、心脏传导缺陷或肌强直，反而可能增加肌肉组织病理学，不支持其作为DM1治疗策略。

Title: Intrinsically cell-penetrating multivalent and multitargeting ligands for myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: 该研究开发了针对DM1三核苷酸重复DNA和RNA的多价配体，通过模拟细胞穿透肽的结构，在细胞和小鼠模型中有效减少或消除DM1特征表型，且无明显毒性。

Title: Transcriptional factor regulation network and competitive endogenous RNA (ceRNA) network determining response of esophageal squamous cell carcinomas to neoadjuvant chemoradiotherapy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被鉴定为调控食管鳞状细胞癌对新辅助放化疗反应的关键转录因子之一。

Title: Precise small-molecule cleavage of an r(CUG) repeat expansion in a myotonic dystrophy mouse model.
Key_Finding: Cugamycin通过特异性识别并切割r(CUG)exp结构，在DM1模型中介导MBNL1释放，从而广泛纠正剪接缺陷，为靶向RNA结构的治疗策略提供概念验证。

Title: Distinct pathological signatures in human cellular models of myotonic dystrophy subtypes.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在强直性肌营养不良1型（DM1）中通过形成RNA foci和异常剪接调控靶基因，导致病理特征，而在DM2中作用不同。

Title: Muscleblind‑like 1 destabilizes Snail mRNA and suppresses the metastasis of colorectal cancer cells via the Snail/E‑cadherin axis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过促进Snail mRNA降解，抑制结直肠癌细胞的EMT和转移。

Title: Chronic exercise mitigates disease mechanisms and improves muscle function in myotonic dystrophy type 1 mice.
Key_Finding: 慢性运动通过减轻RNA毒性、释放MBNL1蛋白和改善mRNA可变剪接，从而改善DM1小鼠的运动功能和肌肉表现。

Title: The MBNL/CELF Splicing Factors Regulate Cytosolic Sulfotransferase 4A1 Protein Expression during Cell Differentiation.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控SULT4A1 mRNA的可变剪接，去除伪外显子6p，促进稳定、功能性SULT4A1蛋白的表达，在神经元分化中起关键作用。

Title: MBNL1 alternative splicing isoforms play opposing roles in cancer.
Key_Finding: MBNL1 Δex7蛋白作为显性负性蛋白，通过诱导DNA损伤和抑制细胞活力与迁移，发挥明确的肿瘤抑制作用，而癌细胞倾向于下调该亚型以促进MBNL1 +ex7亚型。

Title: Circular RNAs in Muscle Function and Disease.
Key_Finding: 环状RNA在基因调控中具有重要作用，其表达失调与疾病相关，特别是在横纹肌组织中高表达，可能参与心脏和骨骼肌疾病的发病机制。

Title: A Dimeric 2,9-Diamino-1,10-phenanthroline Derivative Improves Alternative Splicing in Myotonic Dystrophy Type 1 Cell and Mouse Models.
Key_Finding: DDAP通过竞争性结合r(CUG)重复序列，部分恢复MBNL1调控的pre-mRNA可变剪接缺陷，具有治疗强直性肌营养不良1型的潜力。

Title: Mir-206 partially rescues myogenesis deficiency by inhibiting CUGBP1 accumulation in the cell models of myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: miR-206通过促进MyoD表达来纠正CUG重复序列和Celf1过表达导致的成肌细胞分化缺陷

Title: Downregulation of the long noncoding RNA MBNL1-AS1 protects sevoflurane-pretreated mice against ischemia-reperfusion injury by targeting KCNMA1.
Key_Finding: 下调lncRNA MBNL1-AS1可能通过激活cGMP-PKG信号通路上调KCNMA1表达，从而促进骨骼肌细胞增殖并抑制凋亡，保护七氟醚预处理小鼠免受TKA后缺血再灌注损伤。

Title: Furamidine Rescues Myotonic Dystrophy Type I Associated Mis-Splicing through Multiple Mechanisms.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在强直性肌营养不良1型中通过调控RNA可变剪接发挥核心功能，其功能失调导致全局剪接错误，而小分子furamidine通过上调MBNL1蛋白水平并减少核糖核蛋白聚集来部分恢复剪接异常。

Title: Generation and Neuronal Differentiation of hiPSCs From Patients With Myotonic Dystrophy Type 2.
Key_Finding: MBNL1蛋白在DM2患者hiPSCs衍生的神经元细胞中被核内RNA病灶隔离，这是该疾病的病理特征。

Title: MBNL splicing activity depends on RNA binding site structural context.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过RNA结构调控可变剪接，其结合位点的排列和数量影响外显子包含效率，且RNA结构影响MBNL蛋白的竞争行为。

Title: Efficient CRISPR/Cas9-mediated editing of trinucleotide repeat expansion in myotonic dystrophy patient-derived iPS and myogenic cells.
Cell_Lines: DM1 patient-specific induced pluripotent stem cells (DM1-iPSC), DM1-iPSC-derived myogenic cells, DM1 patient-specific myoblasts
Key_Finding: 通过CRISPR/Cas9切除DMPK基因的CTG重复扩增，恢复了MBNL1的正常细胞内定位，从而纠正了SERCA1的剪接模式异常。

Title: miR-23b and miR-218 silencing increase Muscleblind-like expression and alleviate myotonic dystrophy phenotypes in mammalian models.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在肌强直性营养不良1型中通过调控可变剪接发挥关键作用，抑制miR-23b和miR-218可增强MBNL蛋白表达并改善疾病表型。

Title: Recapitulating muscle disease phenotypes with myotonic dystrophy 1 induced pluripotent stem cells: a tool for disease modeling and drug discovery.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1中被RNA foci隔离，导致BIN1基因的可变剪接异常，而反义寡核苷酸治疗可消除RNA foci并纠正剪接缺陷。

Title: Small Molecules Which Improve Pathogenesis of Myotonic Dystrophy Type 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被CUG重复扩增的DMPK RNA隔离导致功能耗竭，引发包括可变剪接在内的RNA代谢异常，是强直性肌营养不良1型发病机制的关键环节。

Title: rbFOX1/MBNL1 competition for CCUG RNA repeats binding contributes to myotonic dystrophy type 1/type 2 differences.
Key_Finding: rbFOX1通过竞争结合CCUG重复序列，部分释放被隔离的MBNL1，从而纠正可变剪接异常并改善DM2果蝇模型的肌肉萎缩和运动缺陷。

Title: Correction: Daunorubicin reduces MBNL1 sequestration caused by CUG-repeat expansion and rescues cardiac dysfunctions in a Drosophila model of myotonic dystrophy (doi: 10.1242/dmm.032557).
Alternative splicing analysis in human monocytes and macrophages reveals MBNL1 as major regulator.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控可变剪接影响单核细胞向巨噬细胞分化，其功能缺陷可能与强直性肌营养不良患者的单核细胞功能障碍相关。

Title: Mechanisms of skeletal muscle wasting in a mouse model for myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1小鼠模型中与核RNA foci共定位，肌肉表型可逆，表明去除毒性RNA可恢复肌肉功能。

Title: Opposing roles of miR-294 and MBNL1/2 in shaping the gene regulatory network of embryonic stem cells.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过结合并促进miR-294靶基因的表达，调控胚胎干细胞的可变剪接程序，影响细胞增殖、凋亡和上皮-间质转化。

Title: Bruno-3 regulates sarcomere component expression and contributes to muscle phenotypes of myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: 在果蝇DM1模型中，细胞质Bru-3通过调控肌节相关转录本和蛋白水平参与疾病发病机制。

Title: Unexpected favorable outcome in a patient with high grade B-cell lymphoma with abnormalities of MYC, BCL6 and BCL2 loci.
Key_Finding: MBNL1基因与BCL6发生融合，可能影响HGBCL的预后，但具体调控机制未明确。

Title: Genome Sequencing and RNA-Motif Analysis Reveal Novel Damaging Noncoding Mutations in Human Tumors.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在癌症中通过其结合位点的突变影响RNA加工，为非编码变异提供新见解。

Title: Daunorubicin reduces MBNL1 sequestration caused by CUG-repeat expansion and rescues cardiac dysfunctions in a Drosophila model of myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被CUG重复序列RNA隔离导致心肌细胞可变剪接异常，是强直性肌营养不良1型心脏功能障碍的关键机制，解除这种隔离可恢复心脏功能。

Title: Antisense Therapy for a Common Corneal Dystrophy Ameliorates TCF4 Repeat Expansion-Mediated Toxicity.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被TCF4基因中的三核苷酸重复扩增形成的核RNA病灶所捕获，导致剪接异常，而反义寡核苷酸治疗能减少病灶形成和MBNL1招募，从而纠正异常剪接，为FECD提供了潜在的治疗策略。

Title: Ubiquitination of MBNL1 Is Required for Its Cytoplasmic Localization and Function in Promoting Neurite Outgrowth.
Key_Finding: MBNL1的K63连接多聚泛素化对其胞质定位至关重要，而胞质MBNL1的去泛素化导致核转位，在DM1脑部具有致病性。

Title: Macroscopic and microscopic diversity of missplicing in the central nervous system of patients with myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1患者中枢神经系统不同区域（如大脑皮层、海马体）中调控基因的可变剪接异常，但在小脑皮层和脊髓中影响较小，首次揭示了小脑分子层的剪接失调。

Title: Design of a "Mini" Nucleic Acid Probe for Cooperative Binding of an RNA-Repeated Transcript Associated with Myotonic Dystrophy Type 1.
Key_Finding: 该研究开发了一种短肽核酸探针，能特异性结合致病性rCUG重复序列并破坏其与MBNL1的复合物，为靶向RNA重复扩增相关疾病的治疗提供了概念验证。

Title: Altered levels of the splicing factor muscleblind modifies cerebral cortical function in mouse models of myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1水平改变影响大脑皮层局部回路功能和胼胝体介导的对侧反应，与强直性肌营养不良的认知和执行功能缺陷相关。

Title: An engineered RNA binding protein with improved splicing regulation.
Key_Finding: MBNL1的ZF1-2结构域通过识别YGCY RNA基序驱动可变剪接调控，而ZF3-4作为通用RNA结合域，合成MBNL蛋白具有作为DM和其他微卫星疾病治疗工具的潜力。

Title: The molecular landscape of pediatric acute myeloid leukemia reveals recurrent structural alterations and age-specific mutational interactions.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在儿童急性髓系白血病中通过体细胞结构变异（如局部缺失）被异常调控，与成人AML的突变模式存在显著差异，提示年龄特异性靶向治疗的必要性。

Title: Myricetin Reduces Toxic Level of CAG Repeats RNA in Huntington's Disease (HD) and Spino Cerebellar Ataxia (SCAs).
Key_Finding: MBNL1被突变RNA中的CAG重复序列隔离，导致前体mRNA的错误剪接，从而参与亨廷顿病的发病机制。

Title: MBNL expression in autoregulatory feedback loops.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过可变剪接的自调节反馈环路，在维持细胞稳态中起关键作用，并延缓强直性肌营养不良的发病。

Title: RAN Translation Regulated by Muscleblind Proteins in Myotonic Dystrophy Type 2.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过核滞留CCUG转录本抑制RAN蛋白表达，其功能丧失可能导致毒性蛋白积累，加剧疾病进展。

Title: Fuchs' Endothelial Corneal Dystrophy and RNA Foci in Patients With Myotonic Dystrophy.
Disease_Type: Fuchs' endothelial corneal dystrophy (FECD), Myotonic dystrophy type 1 (DM1)
Key_Finding: MBNL1与扩增的CUG重复RNA在核内共定位形成RNA-MBNL1 foci，连接了两种重复扩增疾病（FECD和DM1），表明DM1患者有患FECD的风险。

Title: The effect of high fat diet on daily rhythm of the core clock genes and muscle functional genes in the skeletal muscle of Chinese soft-shelled turtle (Trionyx sinensis).
Key_Finding: MBNL1在中华鳖骨骼肌中作为肌肉功能基因，其表达在高脂饮食下未显示昼夜节律振荡，但研究未明确其调控机制或下游靶基因。

Title: CRISPR-mediated genetic interaction profiling identifies RNA binding proteins controlling metazoan fitness.
Key_Finding: MBNL1与ELAVL在秀丽隐杆线虫中的遗传相互作用揭示了它们通过胰岛素信号通路共同调控数百个转录本和异构体，对维持机体健康和寿命延长起关键作用。

Title: Structural Basis for Interaction of the Tandem Zinc Finger Domains of Human Muscleblind with Cognate RNA from Human Cardiac Troponin T.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过其锌指结构域特异性结合心脏肌钙蛋白T前体mRNA中的CGCU序列，调控组织特异性可变剪接，这与强直性肌营养不良的发病机制相关。

Title: Disrupted prenatal RNA processing and myogenesis in congenital myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在先天性肌强直性营养不良（CDM）中通过调控RNA可变剪接和聚腺苷酸化异常，是疾病发生的关键致病因子，并在小鼠模型中重现了CDM的病理特征。

Title: Transcriptomic profile analysis of mouse neural tube development by RNA-Seq.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在神经管发育过程中作为差异剪接基因参与，可能与神经管缺陷的发生相关。

Title: Splicing regulators in endothelial cell differentiation.
Key_Finding: MBNL1与MED23、MBNL2共同调控内皮细胞分化过程中的可变剪接事件，可能作为心血管疾病早期诊断的生物标志物。

Title: Downregulation of the Glial GLT1 Glutamate Transporter and Purkinje Cell Dysfunction in a Mouse Model of Myotonic Dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1失活导致GLT1谷氨酸转运蛋白下调，增加谷氨酸神经毒性，是DM1脑病理生理的关键机制，上调GLT1可改善神经元功能。

Title: (CCUG)n RNA toxicity in a Drosophila model of myotonic dystrophy type 2 (DM2) activates apoptosis.
Key_Finding: MBNL1能够挽救DM2模型中由CCUG重复序列引起的基因错误剪接，而CUGBP1则不能。

Title: In silico discovery of substituted pyrido[2,3-d]pyrimidines and pentamidine-like compounds with biological activity in myotonic dystrophy models.
Key_Finding: 该研究发现两种小分子化合物能通过结合CUG重复序列，释放被隔离的MBNL1蛋白，从而改善DM1疾病模型的运动功能。

Title: A flow cytometry-based screen identifies MBNL1 modulators that rescue splicing defects in myotonic dystrophy type I.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1疾病中通过调控pre-mRNA剪接发挥关键作用，其过表达可挽救剪接缺陷并逆转肌强直，而小分子HDAC抑制剂如ISOX和vorinostat能上调MBNL1表达并部分修复剪接缺陷，为治疗提供了潜在药物靶点。

Title: Genetic rearrangements result in altered gene expression and novel fusion transcripts in Sézary syndrome.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在Sézary综合征中参与基因重排，形成新的融合转录本，可能影响疾病基因组复杂性。

Title: Optical Mapping Approaches on Muscleblind-Like Compound Knockout Mice for Understanding Mechanistic Insights Into Ventricular Arrhythmias in Myotonic Dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1缺失导致心肌细胞超微结构异常、动作电位时程延长和传导速度减慢，增加心律失常易感性。

Title: Reduced cytoplasmic MBNL1 is an early event in a brain-specific mouse model of myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在DM1脑部疾病中，其细胞质分布减少是响应扩展CUG RNA的早期事件，导致可变剪接失调和神经退行性过程。

Title: Pseudouridine Modification Inhibits Muscleblind-like 1 (MBNL1) Binding to CCUG Repeats and Minimally Structured RNA through Reduced RNA Flexibility.
Key_Finding: MBNL1作为可变剪接调控因子，在强直性肌营养不良2型中，其被CCUG重复RNA结合和隔离导致疾病发生，而假尿苷修饰可抑制MBNL1与RNA的结合。

Title: Trinucleotide Repeat Expansion in the Transcription Factor 4 (TCF4) Gene Leads to Widespread mRNA Splicing Changes in Fuchs' Endothelial Corneal Dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在FECD患者角膜内皮组织中发生差异剪接，与TCF4基因CTG三核苷酸重复扩增导致的RNA毒性相关，影响内皮屏障功能。

Title: Autoregulation of MBNL1 function by exon 1 exclusion from MBNL1 transcript.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控自身前体mRNA中e1外显子的可变剪接，影响蛋白质稳定性和剪接活性，从而控制MBNL1的稳态水平，为肌强直性营养不良的治疗提供了新策略。

Title: Development of pharmacophore models for small molecules targeting RNA: Application to the RNA repeat expansion in myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1作为可变剪接调控因子，在DM1中被扩增的CUG重复序列（r(CUG)exp）所隔离，导致疾病缺陷；研究发现小分子化合物能破坏MBNL1-r(CUG)exp复合物，从而改善DM1缺陷。

Title: RNA Sequence Context Effects Measured In Vitro Predict In Vivo Protein Binding and Regulation.
Key_Finding: RNA二级结构广泛抑制MBNL1等RNA结合蛋白的基序结合，序列背景突变通过改变基序可及性影响蛋白结合和调控活性。

Title: A 6.5 mb deletion at 3q24q25.2 narrows Wisconsin syndrome critical region to a 750 kb interval: A potential role for MBNLI.
Key_Finding: MBNL1基因可能参与导致Wisconsin综合征表型，其缺失与患者发育迟缓、语言缺失等症状相关。

Title: The Calcineurin Variant CnAβ1 Controls Mouse Embryonic Stem Cell Differentiation by Directing mTORC2 Membrane Localization and Activation.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过促进非典型钙调神经磷酸酶Aβ变体CnAβ1的生成，调控mTORC2复合物的定位和激活，从而影响小鼠胚胎干细胞向中胚层分化的过程。

Title: Mechanistic determinants of MBNL activity.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在MBNL家族中具有最高的可变剪接活性，且是RNA foci中最具流动性的旁系同源物，这些功能差异可能用于改善DM1的治疗策略。

Title: Dose-Dependent Regulation of Alternative Splicing by MBNL Proteins Reveals Biomarkers for Myotonic Dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过剂量依赖性调控可变剪接事件，可用于评估肌强直性营养不良患者的疾病严重程度和作为生物标志物。

Title: A Ligand That Targets CUG Trinucleotide Repeats.
Key_Finding: 该研究开发了一种能特异性结合CUG三核苷酸重复序列的小分子DAP，通过影响翻译过程来调控基因表达，为治疗强直性肌营养不良1型提供了潜在工具。

Title: Lentiviral vector-mediated overexpression of mutant ataxin-7 recapitulates SCA7 pathology and promotes accumulation of the FUS/TLS and MBNL1 RNA-binding proteins.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在SCA7疾病中与突变ataxin-7共聚集于核内包涵体，可能参与病理过程。

Title: Identification of Plant-derived Alkaloids with Therapeutic Potential for Myotonic Dystrophy Type I.
Key_Finding: MBNL1被(CUG)n重复序列捕获导致其功能缺失，进而引起多个靶前mRNA的可变剪接失调，这是强直性肌营养不良1型的核心病理机制。

Title: A Potent Inhibitor of Protein Sequestration by Expanded Triplet (CUG) Repeats that Shows Phenotypic Improvements in a Drosophila Model of Myotonic Dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在强直性肌营养不良中作为关键的可变剪接调控因子，其功能异常导致胰岛素受体等pre-mRNA剪接缺陷，靶向MBNL1-rCUG复合物的小分子化合物可纠正剪接缺陷并改善疾病表型。

Title: Nuclear speckles are detention centers for transcripts containing expanded CAG repeats.
Cell_Lines: fibroblasts, lymphoblasts, iPS cells, neuronal progenitors
Key_Finding: MBNL1与CAG重复RNA焦点部分共定位，解释了MBNL1依赖性基因的轻度失调。

Title: Identification of variants in MBNL1 in patients with a myotonic dystrophy-like phenotype.
Key_Finding: 在强直性肌营养不良患者中发现了MBNL1基因的潜在致病性变异，但尚未确认这些变异与疾病表型的直接关联，需进一步研究验证。

Title: Large-scale analysis of genome and transcriptome alterations in multiple tumors unveils novel cancer-relevant splicing networks.
Key_Finding: MBNL1调控NUMA1的可变剪接，促进细胞增殖和中心体扩增，揭示其在癌症发展中的关键作用。

Title: Phenylbutazone induces expression of MBNL1 and suppresses formation of MBNL1-CUG RNA foci in a mouse model of myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: PBZ通过上调MBNL1表达和减弱其与异常CUG重复序列的结合，改善DM1小鼠模型的异常剪接和肌肉功能。

Title: Splicing misregulation of SCN5A contributes to cardiac-conduction delay and heart arrhythmia in myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1调控SCN5A的可变剪接，其异常导致心脏钠通道功能改变，是强直性肌营养不良中心律失常和传导延迟的关键机制。

Title: Multiphasic and Dynamic Changes in Alternative Splicing during Induction of Pluripotency Are Coordinated by Numerous RNA-Binding Proteins.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在成纤维细胞重编程为多能性过程中，通过调控可变剪接参与阶段特异性剪接程序，影响细胞命运转变。

Title: Roles for RNA-binding proteins in development and disease.
Key_Finding: 该摘要未具体讨论MBNL1，而是综述RNA结合蛋白在发育和疾病中的一般调控作用。

Title: Distal Alternative Last Exons Localize mRNAs to Neural Projections.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控可变末端外显子（ALEs）的亚细胞定位，在神经元分化过程中促进mRNA向神经突的定位，这一过程在细胞重编程和癌症中可被逆转。

Title: Muscleblind-like 1 suppresses breast cancer metastatic colonization and stabilizes metastasis suppressor transcripts.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过增强DBNL和TACC1转录本的稳定性，抑制乳腺癌细胞侵袭和多器官转移，其高表达与降低转移复发风险相关。

Title: Therapeutic potential of targeting microRNA-10b in established intracranial glioblastoma: first steps toward the clinic.
Key_Finding: MBNL1是miR-10b通过非经典靶向调控的靶基因之一，参与胶质母细胞瘤干细胞的可变剪接和细胞周期调控，抑制miR-10b可解除对MBNL1等靶基因的抑制，减缓肿瘤生长。

Title: miR-30-5p Regulates Muscle Differentiation and Alternative Splicing of Muscle-Related Genes by Targeting MBNL.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控Trim55和INSR的可变剪接，参与肌肉细胞分化过程。

Title: Oral administration of erythromycin decreases RNA toxicity in myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: 红霉素通过抑制CUG重复序列与MBNL1的结合，减少核糖核蛋白聚集并挽救剪接异常，改善DM1模型小鼠的肌强直，可能成为DM1的潜在疗法。

Title: A genome landscape of SRSF3-regulated splicing events and gene expression in human osteosarcoma U2OS cells.
Key_Finding: SRSF3通过调控包括MBNL1在内的164个基因的可变剪接事件，影响细胞增殖或细胞周期相关基因表达，维持细胞稳态。

Title: Actinomycin D Specifically Reduces Expanded CUG Repeat RNA in Myotonic Dystrophy Models.
Key_Finding: ActD通过抑制CTG重复序列的转录，降低CUG转录本水平并逆转DM1相关的剪接缺陷，为DM1治疗提供了新策略。

Title: MBNL1-mediated regulation of differentiation RNAs promotes myofibroblast transformation and the fibrotic response.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过直接结合并调控分化特异性和细胞骨架/基质组装转录本网络，促进成纤维细胞向肌成纤维细胞分化，从而影响伤口愈合和纤维化重塑。

Title: Genomic profiling screens small molecules of metastatic prostate carcinoma.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在转移性前列腺癌中可能发挥重要作用，但具体调控机制未明确。

Title: RNA FISH for detecting expanded repeats in human diseases.
Key_Finding: 该研究未直接涉及MBNL1，而是综述了RNA FISH技术在检测重复序列扩展相关疾病中核RNA包涵体的应用。

Title: Splicing of human chloride channel 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过调控CLCN1基因的可变剪接影响正常剪接变体的表达，其异常剪接导致强直性肌营养不良中的肌强直症状。

Title: Muscleblind-Like 1 and Muscleblind-Like 3 Depletion Synergistically Enhances Myotonia by Altering Clc-1 RNA Translation.
Key_Finding: MBNL1与MBNL3协同调控Clc-1 mRNA的翻译，通过招募Hsp70和eEF1A促进翻译，其缺失导致剪接错误和翻译缺陷共同加剧肌强直。

Title: Computational investigation of RNA CUG repeats responsible for myotonic dystrophy 1.
Key_Finding: 该研究提出了一种结合自由能微扰和标度粒子理论的新方法，通过将水合熵分解为静电和疏水贡献，显著提高了分子水合熵预测的准确性。

Title: Rationally designed small molecules that target both the DNA and RNA causing myotonic dystrophy type 1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在强直性肌营养不良1型中被异常CUG转录本隔离，导致功能丧失，而设计的小分子药物通过抑制转录、阻止MBNL1结合和降解毒性RNA来逆转这一病理过程。

Title: Muscleblind-like 1 is required for normal heart valve development in vivo.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在体内通过负调控TGFβ信号通路，对正常心脏瓣膜形态发生和稳态维持至关重要。

Title: Studying a Drug-like, RNA-Focused Small Molecule Library Identifies Compounds That Inhibit RNA Toxicity in Myotonic Dystrophy.
Key_Finding: 开发了一种偏向结合RNA的小分子化合物库，能有效靶向并改善强直性肌营养不良1型中重复RNA引起的细胞功能障碍，具有更高的命中率和更优的药理特性。

Title: Sense and Antisense DMPK RNA Foci Accumulate in DM1 Tissues during Development.
Key_Finding: MBNL1蛋白在先天性肌强直性营养不良（CDM）中与扩增的DMPK RNA核内病灶共定位，表明其在疾病早期发育阶段参与毒性RNA积累机制。

Title: MBNL Sequestration by Toxic RNAs and RNA Misprocessing in the Myotonic Dystrophy Brain.
Key_Finding: MBNL1蛋白在强直性肌营养不良大脑中被RNA扩增直接隔离，导致其从正常RNA靶标中耗竭，进而影响可变剪接和多聚腺苷酸化。

Title: Nuclear retention of full-length HTT RNA is mediated by splicing factors MBNL1 and U2AF65.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过增加扩展HTT RNA的核滞留并减少其胞质表达，在亨廷顿病中发挥调控作用。

Title: Fusion events lead to truncation of FOS in epithelioid hemangioma of bone.
Key_Finding: 该研究发现FOS基因重排导致其蛋白截断并丢失反式激活域，这可能是骨上皮样血管瘤肿瘤发生的新机制，并可作为诊断工具。

Title: Structural Insights Reveal the Dynamics of the Repeating r(CAG) Transcript Found in Huntington's Disease (HD) and Spinocerebellar Ataxias (SCAs).
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过结合扩展的r(CAG)重复序列在神经退行性疾病中发挥RNA介导的致病机制作用。

Title: Therapeutic Approaches for Dominant Muscle Diseases: Highlight on Myotonic Dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1作为可变剪接调节因子，其活性被突变RNA改变，导致多个前体mRNA的可变剪接失调，从而引发强直性肌营养不良的临床症状。

Title: Therapeutic impact of systemic AAV-mediated RNA interference in a mouse model of myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: 通过rAAV递送RNAi靶向CUG(exp) mRNA，可显著减轻DM1小鼠模型的病理特征，包括减少异常mRNA、改善肌强直放电、恢复成年剪接模式等，为DM1提供了系统性基因治疗策略。

Title: Abnormal splicing switch of DMD's penultimate exon compromises muscle fibre maintenance in myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1功能缺失导致DMD基因第78外显子异常剪接，表达胚胎型肌营养不良蛋白替代成年型，损害肌肉纤维维持，促进DM1进行性肌营养不良过程。

Title: The polymorphic terminal-loop of pre-miR-1307 binding with MBNL1 contributes to colorectal carcinogenesis via interference with Dicer1 recruitment.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过结合pre-miR-1307的C等位基因并阻断Dicer加工，导致miR-1307表达下调，进而使其靶基因Bcl2过表达，促进结直肠癌的发生。

Title: Association between NKX2-5 rs29784 and infantile hypertrophic pyloric stenosis in Chinese Han population.
Key_Finding: 研究发现MBNL1附近的SNP位点rs11712066和rs573872与中国汉族人群的婴儿肥厚性幽门狭窄无显著关联。

Title: scaRNAs regulate splicing and vertebrate heart development.
Key_Finding: MBNL1作为心脏发育调控基因，其可变剪接异常与法洛四联症等先天性心脏缺陷相关，揭示了剪接调控在心脏发育中的重要作用。

Title: Genome-wide analysis of alternative transcripts in human breast cancer.
Key_Finding: MBNL1是乳腺癌中参与异常剪接的九个剪接因子之一，可能作为肿瘤转录组形成的新治疗靶点。

Title: Identification of recurrent regulated alternative splicing events across human solid tumors.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在多种实体瘤中调控可变剪接事件，可能对肿瘤发展具有潜在致病作用。

Title: Celf1 regulates cell cycle and is partially responsible for defective myoblast differentiation in myotonic dystrophy RNA toxicity.
Key_Finding: Celf1在肌细胞终末分化中起负调控作用，部分介导了DM1的RNA毒性，靶向Celf1可能是纠正DM1肌肉表型的有效策略。

Title: Antagonistic regulation of mRNA expression and splicing by CELF and MBNL proteins.
Key_Finding: MBNL1与CELF蛋白在mRNA丰度和可变剪接调控上存在拮抗作用，共同调控心脏和肌肉基因的发育转换。

Title: Loss of muscleblind-like 1 results in cardiac pathology and persistence of embryonic splice isoforms.
Target_Genes: Scn5a, Junctin, Junctate, Atp2a1, Atp11a, Cacna1s, Ryr2, Clta, Stx2, Tjp1, Capn3, Sirt2, Csda, Trim55, Mapt, Pdlim3, Pdlim5, Sorbs1, Sorbs2, Fhod1, Spag9, Myom1, Tnnt2, Zasp
Key_Finding: MBNL1缺失导致心脏RNA网络中胚胎剪接异构体持续存在，引发心肌功能障碍和猝死，是强直性肌营养不良I型心脏疾病的关键启动因素。

Title: Short antisense-locked nucleic acids (all-LNAs) correct alternative splicing abnormalities in myotonic dystrophy.
Key_Finding: 短链全LNA反义寡核苷酸能有效结合CUG重复RNA，阻止CUG(exp)/MBNL复合物形成，纠正MBNL敏感的可变剪接缺陷，是治疗DM1的有前景工具。

Title: RNA toxicity and missplicing in the common eye disease fuchs endothelial corneal dystrophy.
Key_Finding: MBNL1在FECD中被poly(CUG)n RNA隔离，导致其调控的mRNA发生错误剪接，这是首次在常见非神经/神经肌肉疾病中报道RNA毒性和错误剪接。

Title: ABLIM1 splicing is abnormal in skeletal muscle of patients with DM1 and regulated by MBNL, CELF and PTBP1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1促进ABLIM1基因外显子11的包含，其异常剪接可能与DM1的肌肉症状相关。

Title: A fly model for the CCUG-repeat expansion of myotonic dystrophy type 2 reveals a novel interaction with MBNL1.
Key_Finding: MBNL1的两种亚型（MBNL135和MBNL140）能切割并上调致病性CCUG重复RNA转录本水平，其中MBNL140效果更显著，揭示了强直性肌营养不良中RNA重复扩增与MBNL1相互作用的新机制。

Title: Nuclear localization of MBNL1: splicing-mediated autoregulation and repression of repeat-derived aberrant proteins.
Key_Finding: MBNL1通过可变剪接调控其核定位，进而抑制由重复扩增RNA产生的异常蛋白质表达，为多种重复扩增疾病提供病理和治疗启示。
